source.title: Champion Belt
body: +1.0 Damage Up
Increases the chance of champion enemies appearing by 15%
Doesn't affect the chance for champion bosses to spawn
An item only found in the Shop room pool

translation.title: 冠军腰带
body: ↑ 伤害+1
精英敌人概率从5%增至20%
不增加精英头目的概率

source.title: Butt Bombs
body: +5 bombs
Bombs now become poop bombs, which deal 10 damage to all enemies in the room and daze them for a short period of time
Butt Bombs heal the poop bosses (Dingle, Dangle, Brownie) by 25% of their max HP
Counts as 1 of 3 poop items needed towards the Oh Crap transformation.

translation.title: 屁股炸弹
body: +5炸弹
爆炸会使房间中所有敌人混乱并造成10点伤害

source.title: Gnawed Leaf
body: If Isaac stands still and stops shooting for a second, he turns to stone, making him invincible until he moves/shoots again
Using bombs or your active item will remove the invicibility as well
This item is a reference to the Tanuki suit in Super Mario 3

translation.title: 狸猫树叶
body: 完全不行动1秒后, 角色无敌

source.title: Spiderbaby
body: Spawns 2-5 friendly attack spiders every time you take damage
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation

translation.title: 蜘蛛宝宝
body: 受伤时, 生成1-2只蓝蜘蛛

source.title: Guppy's Collar
body: When Isaac dies, he has a 50% chance to resurrect with 1/2 a heart
Counts as 1 of 3 cat items needed towards the Guppy transformation

translation.title: 嗝屁猫的项圈
body: 死亡时, 50%概率以半心重生

source.title: Lost Contact
body: All of Isaac's tears now have a shield, allowing them to block an enemy projectile
If a tear blocks something, both Isaac's and the enemies tears are destroyed
-0.16 Shot Speed Down

translation.title: 丢失的隐形眼镜
body: 角色的泪弹能摧毁敌人的弹幕

source.title: Anemic
body: +1.5 Range Up
When Isaac takes damage, he will start to leave a trail of blood creep behind him as he walks for the current room. The creep deals 2 damage per tick while enemies stand in it
Lazarus' revived form (Lazarus II) respawns with this item

translation.title: 贫血
body: ↑ 射程+5
受伤时, 在房间中留下血迹
血迹每秒造成6点伤害

source.title: Goat Head
body: Gives Isaac a guaranteed devil or angel room on every floor that they can appear, even if you have already beaten the boss and it didn't show up originally
Taking the Goat Head (or any other item) in a Devil Deal bars you from encountering Angel Rooms naturally. After which, the only way to access an Angel Room is via the Sacrifice Room

translation.title: 山羊头
body: 100%恶魔房/天使房概率

source.title: Ceremonial Robes
body: +3 Black Hearts
+1 Damage Up
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect

translation.title: 仪式法袍
body: ↑ 伤害+1
+3黑心

source.title: Mom's Wig
body: Isaac now has a small chance to create friendly attack spiders everytime he fires a tear
Can create up to a maximum of 5 spiders in the room at one time
The Hive Mind item allows Mom's Wig to spawn a maximum of 10 spiders at once, and increases their damage
The chance to create a spider is affected by your luck stat and at +10 Luck it will activate every time
Heals you for 1 red heart when picked up
Counts as 1 of 3 mom items needed towards the Mom transformation

translation.title: 妈妈的假发
body: 治疗1红心
发射泪弹时, 5%概率生成1只蓝蜘蛛

source.title: Placenta
body: +1 HP Up
Gives a chance to heal 1/2 a red heart every time the in-game timer hits a new minute
Heals one red heart container when picked up
There are no restrictions on when the regeneration effect happens as long as the game is not paused, so you can simply afk and heal over time
Works in crawl spaces
It's possible to find this item by blowing up Polyps (the weird red rocks found in the Womb floors)

translation.title: 胎盘
body: ↑ +1心之容器
每分钟50%概率治疗半红心

source.title: Old Bandage
body: +1 HP Up
The given heart container is empty
When you get hit, you will sometimes cause hearts to drop on the floor
The chance to drop hearts is affected by your luck stat and at +29 Luck it will activate 50% of the time

translation.title: 旧绷带
body: ↑ +1空心之容器
受伤时, 10%概率生成1红心

source.title: Sad Bombs
body: +5 Bombs
Everytime a bomb explodes, it will release a circle of 10 tears outwards, much like the Tammy's Head effect
The tears from each bomb deal a flat 25 damage and are affected by any tear modifiers Isaac has
The tears caused by Sad Bombs are much larger and do a lot more damage than Isaac's normal tears

translation.title: 悲伤炸弹
body: +5炸弹
角色的炸弹爆炸时环形发射10颗泪弹

source.title: Rubber Cement
body: Isaac's tears now bounce off walls and objects in the environment, such as rocks and pots
Allows tears to hit the same enemy multiple times
If you also have Lost Contact, tears will bounce off enemy projectiles instead of being destroyed
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Mom's heart 2 times

translation.title: 橡胶胶水
body: 角色的泪弹会在敌人和障碍物上反弹

source.title: Anti-Gravity
body: -2 Tear Delay (Tears Up)
As you hold down the fire button, shots will float in the same place until you release the fire key again
Allows you to store up a lot of tears in the air and release them all at once
When the tears are released, they will fire off in the direction that Isaac was originally facing when it was created

translation.title: 反重力
body: ↑ 射击延迟-2
按住发射键会使泪弹悬空
松开后, 所有泪弹会向发射方向继续前进

source.title: Pyromaniac
body: +5 Bombs
All explosions now heal Isaac for 0.5 red hearts instead of hurting him
Pyromaniac grants Isaac immunity to fire, but does not protect against stomps or shockwave effects

translation.title: 纵火狂
body: +5炸弹
免疫爆炸, 岩石波, 践踏的伤害
受爆炸击中时治疗1红心

source.title: Cricket's Body
body: -1 Tear Delay (Tears Up)
-1.3 Range Down
x1.2 Tear Size
Makes tears break into 4 smaller tears on impact with anything, which deal half of your damage

translation.title: 柯吉猫的身体
body: ↑ 射击延迟-1
↑ 泪弹尺寸x1.2
泪弹击中后会分裂为4颗
分裂的泪弹造成的伤害减半

source.title: Gimpy
body: When getting hit, this item has a chance to drop a soul heart or black heart
The chance to spawn a heart is affected by your luck stat and at +22 Luck it will activate 50% of the time
Enemies have a chance to drop half a red heart when killed

translation.title: 兽性面具
body: 受伤时, 概率生成1魂心
敌人死亡时概率掉落1半红心

source.title: Black Lotus
body: +1 HP Up
+1 Soul Heart
+1 Black Heart
Heals one red heart container when picked up
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect
An item only found in the secret room pool

translation.title: 黑莲花
body: ↑ +1心之容器
+1魂心
+1黑心

source.title: Piggy Bank
body: +3 Coins when picked up
When you take damage, 1-2 coins will drop on the floor
When playing as the Keeper, this item drops 0-1 coins instead

translation.title: 小猪存钱罐
body: +3硬币
受伤时, 生成1-2硬币

source.title: Mom's Perfume
body: -1 Tear Delay (Tears Up)
Isaac's tears have a 15% chance of causing a fear effect
Feared enemies will run away from Isaac temporarily
The chance to fear enemies is affected by your luck stat and at +85 Luck it will activate every time
Counts as 1 of 3 mom items needed towards the Mom transformation

translation.title: 妈妈的香水
body: ↑ 射击延迟-1
15%概率发射恐惧泪弹

source.title: Monstro's Lung
body: Tears can now be charged and released in a shotgun style effect, much like Monstro's main attack
Tears down (Tear delay * 4.3)
Partial charging does nothing - must be fully charged to use

translation.title: 萌死戳的肺
body: ↓ 射击延迟x4.3
泪弹可蓄力并在松开时散射

source.title: Abaddon
body: On pickup Abaddon converts all your heart containers to black hearts, then gives you +2 more black hearts
+1.5 Damage Up
+0.2 Speed Up
Tears now have a chance to induce the fear effect, causing enemies to run away from Isaac for a short period
The chance to fear enemies is affected by your luck stat and at +85 Luck it will activate every time
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect
Counts as 1 of 3 evil items needed towards the Leviathan transformation
When taken as The Keeper, your coin health is reduced to 1
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Chest with Azazel

translation.title: 亚巴顿
body: ↓ 移除所有心之容器
+6黑心
15%概率发射恐惧泪弹

source.title: Ball of Tar
body: Isaac leaves a trail of tar behind him which will slow down enemies that walk over it
Tears have a chance to slow enemies and their projectiles for a short period of time
The chance to slow enemies can improve based on your luck stat and will always slow enemies at +18 Luck

translation.title: 焦油球
body: 10%概率发射减速泪弹
角色会留下减速水迹

source.title: Stop Watch
body: +0.3 Speed Up
The Stop Watch applies a permanent but slight slowing effect to all enemies and their projectiles
The slowing effect has a reduced effect against Brimstone lasers fired by enemies
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 999 pennies to the Shop

translation.title: 怀表
body: 受伤时, 使房间中的所有敌人永久减速

source.title: Tiny Planet
body: Range greatly increased
Grants spectral tears
Tears now revolve around Isaac's Body at a fixed distance until they hit the ground
The tears orbit close to Isaac, offset slightly in the direction fired. Changing the firing direction will redirect all previously fired tears
Causes a lot of great synergies with items such as Lump of Coal, Brimstone, Rubber Cement, Technology and most of the worm trinkets

translation.title: 小小星球
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+7
灵体泪弹
角色的泪弹环绕在角色周围

source.title: Infestation 2
body: Creates a friendly blue spider when you kill an enemy
Spiders are spawned at the location where the enemy died
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 害虫横行II
body: 击杀敌人时, 生成1只蓝蜘蛛

source.title: E. Coli
body: E. Coli turns normal enemies into poop if they touch you
Enemies can turn into poop even if they do not do contact damage, allowing you to apply the effect without taking damage
Can be combined with Midas Touch to turn enemies into Golden Poop
This does not work on mini-bosses and bosses
Counts as 1 of 3 poop items needed towards the Oh Crap transformation

translation.title: 大肠杆菌
body: 接触敌人时, 使其变成大便

source.title: Death's Touch
body: +1.5 Damage Up
-0.3 Tears Down
x2 Tear Size
Isaac's tears turn into large scythes that pierce through enemies (Similar to how Death's scythes look)
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Challenge #17 (Waka Waka)

translation.title: 死神之触
body: ↑ 泪弹尺寸x2
穿刺泪弹

source.title: Key Piece #1
body: Increases your chances to find an Angel Room instead of a Devil Room. See the dedicated Devil room page for more details
First half of the key required to enter the door to the Mega Satan boss
Drops from one of the angels which appear by bombing the statue in an angel room

translation.title: 钥匙碎片1
body: 集齐两个钥匙碎片可开启金色大门
天使房概率+25%
永恒之心概率+2%

source.title: Key Piece #2
body: Increases your chances to find an Angel Room instead of a Devil Room. See the dedicated Devil room page for more details
Second half of the key required to enter the door to the Mega Satan boss
Drops from one of the angels which appear by bombing the statue in an angel room

translation.title: 钥匙碎片2
body: 集齐两个钥匙碎片可开启金色大门
天使房概率+25%
永恒之心概率+2%

source.title: Experimental Treatment
body: Randomly increases 4 of your stats, and decreases 2 of them
Possible stat changes are fixed values: ±1 health, ±1 damage, ±0.2 speed, ±0.5 range, ±0.5 tears, ±0.2 shot speed, ±1 luck
Counts as 1 of 3 syringe items needed towards the Spun transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Mom's Heart 7 times

translation.title: 实验性疗法
body: ↑ 随机提升4项属性
↓ 随机降低2项属性

source.title: Contract From Below
body: Doubles pickups and chests from clearing a room
Also gives a 30% chance for room clear rewards to not spawn
Doesn't affect coins spawned in Greed Mode

translation.title: 地狱契约
body: 所有房间清理奖励翻倍
33%概率房间清理奖励消失

source.title: Infamy
body: Gives a 50% chance to not take damage from projectiles

translation.title: 耻辱假面
body: 50%概率阻挡弹幕

source.title: Trinity Shield
body: Puts a shield in front of Isaac which blocks projectiles
The shield will rotate based on the direction in which Isaac is firing tears

translation.title: 三位一体盾
body: 阻挡角色发射方向的敌人弹幕

source.title: Tech.5
body: Gives Isaac a laser that will fire at random intervals in addition to your normal tears
Each laser does damage equal to your current tear damage
The laser will occasionally fire with one of these effects: Hook Worm, Spoon Bender, Tiny Planet, Mysterious Liquid, Rubber Cement
Luck has no effect on the rate at which Tech.5 fires and does not scale with items that increase your tears stat
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Challenge #18 (The Host)

translation.title: 科技0.5
body: 时不时发射激光
Isaac now shoots two tears at once
0.75x damage multiplier
Unlike the Inner Eye and Mutant Spider items, this double shot item does not give a tears down

translation.title: 完美视力
body: 角色同时发射2颗泪弹

source.title: Blue Map
body: Reveals the locations of the secret and super secret room for the current floor and all future floors
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 10 pennies to the Shop

translation.title: 蓝地图
body: 在地图上揭示隐藏房

source.title: BFFS!
body: Makes all of Isaac's familiars stronger and bigger
Causes most familiars to deal double damage
Has no effect on most familiars that scale with Isaac's tear damage

translation.title: 好朋友一辈子！
body: 跟班造成的伤害翻倍

source.title: Hive Mind
body: Causes your friendly blue spiders and flies to become bigger and do x2 more damage
Allows Mom's Wig to spawn a maximum of 10 spiders at once instead of 5
Fly and spider familiars become stronger similar to BFFS
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 虫群之心
body: 蓝蜘蛛/蓝苍蝇造成的伤害翻倍

source.title: There's Options
body: Two items now spawn after beating a boss fight and the boss rush, however only one can be taken
The additional item will pick from the Boss Item Pool
Does nothing after the Krampus fight
Unlocked by donating to the donation machine in the shop
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 50 pennies to the Shop

translation.title: 额外选择
body: 允许角色击败头目后从2个道具中选择

source.title: Bogo Bombs
body: All bomb pickups are now 1+1 bombs
An item only found in the Shop item pool

translation.title: 炸弹买一送一
body: 所有炸弹掉落物变成一对炸弹

source.title: Starter Deck
body: Spawns a random card
Isaac can now hold 2 cards or runes at once. Tap the drop button to cycle between each one
All future pill drops will now instead become cards
An item only available in the Shop room

translation.title: 新手牌组
body: 拾起时, 生成1卡牌
角色能携带2卡牌
将所有胶囊变成卡牌

source.title: Little Baggy
body: Allows for 2 pills to be held. Tap the drop button to cycle between each one
Drops a pill on the floor when picked up
Changes all card and rune drops into pills. Any Tarot card or rune on the floor or current held when picking this item up will change into a pill
Dice Shard counts as a card and will be converted
source.unlock: Unlock this item by picking up 2 of the following items: Roid Rage, The Virus, Growth Hormones, Experimental Treatment or Speed Ball

translation.title: 小药袋
body: 拾起时, 生成1胶囊
角色能携带2胶囊
将所有卡牌变成胶囊

source.title: Magic Scab
body: +1 HP Up
+1.0 Luck Up
Heals one red heart container when picked up

translation.title: 魔法血痂
body: ↑ +1心之容器
↑ 幸运+1

source.title: Blood Clot
body: +1.0 Damage Up (Left eye only)
+1.5 Range Up (Left eye only)
The above stats only apply to tears fired from Isaac's left eye or with a 50% chance if you have an item which causes you to fire from a single source only

translation.title: 血块
body: ↑ 左眼伤害+1
↑ 左眼射程+5
↑ 泪弹高度+0.5

source.title: Screw
body: +0.5 Tears Up
+0.2 Shot Speed Up

source.title: Hot Bombs
body: +5 Bombs
Grants immunity to fire
Enemies touching placed bombs take 16 damage
Gives all bombs a burning effect when they explode, leaving fire on the floor which deals 22 damage to enemies

translation.title: 炙热炸弹
body: +5炸弹
角色的炸弹爆炸时会留下火焰

source.title: Fire Mind
body: Isaac's tears now set enemies on fire, leaving a damage over time effect that does 4 or 6 damage per tick
There is a chance that tears that hit enemies will explode, leaving a small fire on the floor that damages enemies
Exploding tears deal damage * 2 + 22 per tick
The chance for tears to explode is affected by your luck stat and at +13 Luck it will activate every time

translation.title: 火焰意志
body: 角色的泪弹可点燃敌人
击中敌人时, 泪弹有10%概率爆炸
爆炸也会伤到角色

source.title: Missing No
body: When picked up, and at the start of each floor this rerolls all your current items, giving you a new item to replace each of the ones you had
Also rerolls all your stats at the same time, giving a random flat modifier that changes each time
Doesn't affect important items such as Polaroid, Negative and Key Pieces
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Lazarus

translation.title: 编号丢失
body: 拾起时和每次进入新层时, 重置角色属性和持有道具

source.title: Dark Matter
body: +1.0 Damage Up
Tears now have a chance to apply the fear effect to enemies, which causes them to run away from Isaac
The chance to fear enemies is affected by your luck stat and at +20 Luck it will activate every time
An item only found in the devil room pool (Note: The Fallen boss pulls items from the Devil Room Pool)

translation.title: 暗物质
body: ↑ 伤害+1
33%概率发射恐惧泪弹

source.title: Black Candle
body: +1 Black Heart
Immunity to all floor curses (e.g. Curse of the Lost)
Black Candle removes the teleportation effect of Cursed Eye
+15% chance of a devil or angel room opening after the boss fight
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 150 pennies to the Shop

translation.title: 黑蜡烛
body: 免疫诅咒
+1黑心
恶魔房/天使房概率+15%

source.title: Proptosis
body: Gives Isaac high damage tears with a short range
Tear size and damage falls off very fast with this item, the further the tear travels the less damage it does
Tear damage starts at triple (300%) and decreases over range to eventually be 0%

translation.title: 眼球突出
body: ↑ 伤害修正x2
↓ 泪弹前进越远伤害越低

source.title: Missing Page 2
body: +1 Black Heart
If the total sum of all your health is at one heart after taking damage, the necronomicon effect will activate, dealing 40 damage to the entire room
Missing Page 2 now doubles all black heart and Necronomicon damage to 80

translation.title: 遗失的书页2
body: +1黑心
受伤至1心时, 对房间中所有敌人造成伤害

source.title: Smart Fly
body: A yellow orbital fly that will block shots and when Isaac gets hit, will seek out the nearest enemy and attack it
If the fly is in its attacking state and there are no longer any enemies in range, it will return to Isaac and go back to being a defensive orbital
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation

translation.title: 智能苍蝇
body: 环绕物
每秒造成22.5点接触伤害
角色受伤前, 阻挡弹幕
角色受伤后, 追击附近敌人

source.title: Dry Baby
body: A familiar that follows Isaac and blocks any shots that hit it
If a projectile is blocked by Dry Baby, he has a 10% chance to activate the Necronomicon effect, dealing 40 damage to the entire room
The chance to activate the effect is not changed by your Luck stat
Can drop while destroying skulls in the Depths and Necropolis floors
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.

translation.title: 枯骨宝宝
body: 当被敌人弹幕击中时, 10%概率对房间中所有敌人造成40点伤害

source.title: Juicy Sack
body: A familiar that follows isaac around dropping white creep which slows down enemies that walk over it
Spawns 1-2 familiar blue spiders after every room
Blue Spiders do x2 of Isaac's damage
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 粘液卵囊
body: 留下减速水迹
清理房间后, 生成1-2只蓝蜘蛛

source.title: Robo-Baby 2.0
body: A familiar that is controlled via the arrow keys and will automatically fire a laser if anything is in its line of sight
Robo-Baby 2.0's lasers deal 3.5 damage per hit
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Challenge #16 (Computer Savvy)

translation.title: 机器宝宝2.0
body: 发射激光
激光造成3.5点伤害
向角色发射方向移动

source.title: Rotten Baby
body: A familiar which follows Isaac and spawns a blue flies as you're firing tears
Rotten Baby can only create one fly at a time, meaning if he has created a fly he cannot make another until it is used
Blue Flies do double your tear damage
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation

translation.title: 腐烂宝宝
body: 角色发射时, 生成蓝苍蝇

source.title: Headless Baby
body: A familiar that follows Isaac and leaves blood creep on the floor as it floats, hurting enemies that walk over it for 2 damage per tick
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation

translation.title: 无头宝宝
body: 留下每秒造成6点伤害的水迹

source.title: Leech
body: Spawns a familiar leech on the ground that hunts down enemies and heals you for half a heart each time it eats one
The Leech deals 1.5 contact damage per tick

translation.title: 水蛭
body: 追击敌人
击杀敌人时为角色治疗半红心
每秒造成3.2点接触伤害

source.title: Mystery Sack
body: A bag that follows Isaac and drops a random heart, coin, bomb or key every 5-6 rooms (alternating, 5 rooms then 6, then repeats)
Can drop any kind of heart, coin, bomb or key
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Dark Room with Eden

translation.title: 神秘的袋子
body: 每5-6个房间生成1随机掉落物

source.title: BBF
body: A large familiar black fly that bounces around the room, exploding on contact with enemies dealing 70 damage
Does not explode if it hits Isaac, however if it explodes on an enemy while Isaac is in range, he will take damage
Respawns after 10 seconds or by moving to another room
Picking up this item as well as 2 other fly-type items will allow you to transform into Lord of the Flies
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation

translation.title: 大美蝇
body: 友好的爆炸苍蝇
爆炸造成60点伤害
爆炸也会伤到角色

source.title: Bob's Brain
body: A green brain that launches in the direction you are firing your tears and will explode on contact with enemies, dealing damage and poisoning anything in the blast radius
Bob's Brain deals 100 damage and applies a poison damage over time effect, which deals double your tear damage per tick
Regenerates over time
Will hurt Isaac if he is in the blast radius
Counts as 1 of 3 poison items needed towards the Bob transformation

translation.title: 鲍勃的脑浆子
body: 向角色发射方向冲刺
接触到敌人时爆炸
爆炸造成60点伤害并使敌人中毒
爆炸也会伤到角色

source.title: Best Bud
body: When Isaac takes damage, a white attack fly will spawn that orbits him at a similar distance to the Distant Admiration fly
The fly orbits a lot faster than Distant Admiration or Forever Alone and deals 10 damage per tick
Picking up this item as well as 2 other fly-type items will allow you to transform into Lord of the Flies
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation

translation.title: 生死之交
body: 受伤时, 在房间中生成1个中范围环绕物
环绕物每秒造成75点接触伤害

source.title: Lil Brimstone
body: A familiar that follows Isaac and can fire up and charge brimstone shots, exactly how the normal Brimstone item works but with less damage
Each laser deals 3 damage per tick, up to 8 times for a total of 24 damage
A familiar found in the devil room
Lil Brimstone is now unable to start charging until he is finished attacking
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.

translation.title: 硫磺火宝宝
body: 蓄力并发射硫磺火激光
激光在0.63秒内造成31.5点伤害

source.title: Isaac's Heart
body: Prevents Isaac from taking any damage, but instead summons a familiar heart that follows you around. If the heart is hit, Isaac will take damage
It will attempt to hide behind you when shooting
Most enemies will target the heart over Isaac himself
Isaac's Heart has a charge attack, which when released will push enemies away and fire blood tears in all directions
Spikes, Curse Rooms and Spiked Chests no longer deal damage to you, but sacrifice rooms still work as normal
Sharp Plug becomes useless with this item, due to how damage is prevented on Isaac's body
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with The Lost

translation.title: 以撒的心脏
body: 角色无敌
生成跟随角色的心脏
心脏受伤时, 角色也会受伤

source.title: Lil Haunt
body: A familiar ghost that follows Isaac around and chases enemies close-by, damaging them for 2 contact damage and causing a fear effect

translation.title: 恶灵宝宝
body: 追击并使敌人恐惧
每秒造成4点接触伤害

source.title: Dark Bum
body: A familiar beggar similar to Bum Friend that follows Isaac and collects red hearts, giving Isaac black hearts, pills, cards, runes or spiders in return
For every 1.5 red hearts he takes, he will give a reward
Reward chances: Black Heart - 40%, Card/Rune - 20%, Pill - 20%, Blue Spider - 10%, Spider 10%
Counts as 1 of 3 bum items needed towards the Super Bum transformation

translation.title: 黑暗乞丐
body: 捡起附近的红心
每捡起1.5红心, 生成1魂心/黑心/蜘蛛

source.title: Big Fan
body: A very large orbital that moves around Isaac very slowly, blocking shots and dealing 2 contact damage per tick
Affects the speed of all other orbitals, slowing them down a lot (NOTE: This effect does not happen until you get a new orbital after Big Fan)
Does not count as one of your three standard orbital slots
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation

translation.title: 大粉丝
body: 较大的环绕物
每秒造成30点接触伤害

source.title: Sissy Long Legs
body: An adorable friendly blue spider that walks around the room laying other blue spiders which attack enemies
Blue Spiders do x2 of Isaac's damage
She can only spawn a maximum of up to 5 spiders at a time and will only do so while there are enemies in the room
Sissy Long Legs also charms enemies on contact
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 长腿蛛妹妹
body: 在有敌人的房间里随机生成蓝蜘蛛, 最多5只

source.title: Punching Bag
body: Spawns a friendly Mulligan that walks around the room. Mulligan can be hit by enemy projectiles, making him a good shield
Enemies will sometimes target the Mulligan if he is closer

translation.title: 受气包
body: 诱饵跟班
敌人有时会以他而不是角色作为目标

source.title: How To Jump
body: When used, makes Isaac leap in the air, similar to the leaper enemies
Maintains momentum if you are already moving in the same direction
If you already have an item which gives you flying, this item becomes a dash effect instead
Can be used in the Isaac boss fight to jump over the beams of light he spawns

translation.title: 跳跃教程
body: 允许角色跳过间隙和障碍物

source.title: D100
body: When used, the D100 will activate the effects of all other dice items at once, including D1, D4, The D6, D7, D8, D10, D12 and D20. Search 'Dice effect' to see all those items and their relevant effects
Note: Full run reroll effects (such as D4) are able to remove heart containers and transformations if losing the respective items during the reroll
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with The Lost

translation.title: 一百面骰
body: 重置房间中所有掉落物, 底座道具和角色持有的被动道具

source.title: D4
body: When used, the D4 re-rolls each item you currently have into another random item from the same item pool
If you have an item with no room pool (e.g. Blood Bag) it will be rerolled into a random Item Room item
Full run reroll effects such as D4 are able to remove heart containers and transformations if losing the respective items during the reroll
Cannot remove Azazel's Brimstone laser, or The Lost's Holy Mantle
source.unlock: Unlock this item by blowing up 30 slot machines

translation.title: 四面骰
body: 重置所有角色持有的被动道具

source.title: D10
body: When used, rerolls all enemies in the room which are currently alive into another random type of enemy
D10 attempts to reroll enemies into enemies of similar health where possible
Cannot reroll mini-bosses or bosses

translation.title: 十面骰
body: 重置房间中所有敌人

source.title: Blank Card
body: When used, copies the effect of the card you are currently holding without consuming it
The charge time depends on the quality of the card you're holding, and will update with each activation
Using this with the ? card will teleport you to the I AM ERROR room
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with Eden

translation.title: 空白卡牌
body: 触发角色持有的符文/卡牌的效果

source.title: Book of Secrets
body: When used, you have a chance of getting one of the three following effects: Treasure Map (floor layout), Compass (map icons) or Blue Map (secret room locations)
Counts as 1 of 3 book items needed towards the Bookworm transformation
Book of Secrets avoids giving mapping effects that you already have. If the player has all mapping effects, it grants the 'I can see forever!' effect for the floor
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Satan with Eden

translation.title: 秘密之书
body: 在本层获得以下三种效果之一:
藏宝图
指南针
蓝地图

source.title: Box of Spiders
body: When used, spawns 4-8 friendly blue spiders on the floor
Blue Spiders do x2 of Isaac's damage
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation

translation.title: 蜘蛛盒
body: 生成1-4只蓝蜘蛛

source.title: Red Candle
body: When used, the candle is raised above Isaac's head. Upon pressing any fire button, a red flame will slide across the floor in that direction, dealing 23 damage per tick to enemies that come into contact with it
Each flame deals 125 total damage and disappears after 10 seconds
The flame will shrink in size when deals damage to something and eventually disappear
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 400 pennies to the Shop

translation.title: 红蜡烛
body: 投掷红火
火焰可造成接触伤害, 阻挡弹幕, 在造成或阻挡5次伤害后消失

source.title: The Jar
body: Isaac can now pick up hearts while at full health, which will be stored in the Jar and can be spawned again using the spacebar
Up to 4 hearts can be stored in The Jar
Soul hearts and black hearts cannot be stored
If used in a Black heart or Eternal heart super secret room, it will spawn the relevant heart

translation.title: 罐子
body: 满血时, 最多将4红心存入罐中
使用时, 所存红心全部掉在地上

source.title: FLUSH!
body: When used, turns every normal enemy in the room into poop!
Does not work on mini-bosses and bosses
Kills poop bosses when used - Dingle, Dangle and Brownie
Counts as 1 of 3 poop items needed towards the Oh Crap transformation

translation.title: 冲水！
body: 使非头目敌人变成大便
立即击杀便便类敌人和头目

source.title: Satanic Bible
body: When used, gives Isaac +1 Black Heart

Using this book once before the boss dies, causes the boss item on the current floor to become a devil deal instead, where it will cost heart containers to pick up. Taking this item DOES count as a devil deal, preventing future angel rooms.
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect
Counts as 1 of 3 book items needed towards the Bookworm transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with Azazel

translation.title: 撒但圣经
body: +1黑心

source.title: Head of Krampus
body: When used, fires a 4 way brimstone laser in all cardinal directions, dealing a lot of damage to any enemies
Laser damage does not scale with your damage stat - its a fixed 10 damage per tick for 20 ticks (200 total per use)
Has a chance to drop after you beat Krampus
If you get close enough to an enemy that has a large hitbox, you can hit it with 2 of the laser beams, allowing you to deal more damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Krampus (Krampus is unlocked by taking 20 devil deal items)

translation.title: 坎卜斯的头
body: 在四个方向上发射硫磺火激光
每道激光在1.33秒内造成440点伤害

source.title: Butter Bean
body: When used, farts on nearby enemies and knocks them backwards forcefully away from Isaac
Allows you to reflect projectiles away from Isaac
If a pushed enemy hits a rock or wall forcefully enough, they take 10 damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by destroying 100 poops

translation.title: 棉豆
body: 击退附近的敌人和弹幕
10%概率在换成其他主动道具再将其换回来后, 变成更强的等等, 啥?

source.title: Magic Fingers
body: Upon use, consumes a coin and deals damage to everything in the room
Damage dealt is equal to your tear damage * 2 + 10

translation.title: 魔术手指
body: 对房间中所有敌人造成2x角色伤害
花费1硬币

source.title: Converter
body: When used, converts 1 soul/black heart into 1 red heart container
This item will take from your soul hearts first

translation.title: 转换器
body: 将2魂心/黑心转换为1心之容器

source.title: Pandora's Box
body: When used, this item will spawn a set of items or consumables based on which chapter you are currently on
Basement 1: 2 Soul hearts. Basement 2: 2 Bombs + 2 Keys
Caves 1: 1 Boss Item. Caves 2: 1 Boss Item + 2 Soul Hearts
Depths 1: 4 Soul hearts. Depths 2: 20 coins
Womb 1: 2 Boss Items. Womb 2: Bible
Blue Womb: Nothing!. The Void: Nothing!
Sheol: 1 Devil Room Item + 1 Black Heart. Cathedral: 1 Angel Room Item + 1 Eternal Heart
Chest: 1 coin. Dark Room: Nothing!
Home: Gives Red Key.
Pandora's Box considers XL floors to always be the first floor of a chapter
Alternative floors drop the same stuff e.g. Corpse II drops same as Womb II
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Dark Room with Lazarus

translation.title: 潘多拉魔盒
body: 根据所在层生成奖励:
4章1: 2道具; 4章2: 圣经
阴间: 1道具+1; 教堂: 1道具+1
暗室: 解锁搬家盒; 玩具箱: 1

source.title: Unicorn Stump
body: When used, turns Isaac invincible and gains +0.28 speed for a 5 seconds
You cannot fire tears while the stump is active
Very similar to the My Little Unicorn item but does not deal contact damage
When used with Mom's Knife, you can still deal contact damage but will be unable to change the way the knife faces while the effect is active

translation.title: 独角兽的残角
body: 在6秒内获得:
无敌
角色无法发射(也没有接触伤害)

source.title: Taurus
body: -0.3 Speed Down
While in a hostile room your speed raises at a rate of +0.065 per game tick
When you hit a speed stat of 2.0, Isaac will gain an invincibility effect for 5 seconds, increasing speed and allowing him to run into enemies to deal 40 contact damage per hit
The time it takes for the effect to activate becomes shorter with a higher base Speed stat
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 金牛座
body: ↑ 在有敌人的房间中, 移速缓慢增加
移速达到2时, 角色无敌并造成接触伤害, 持续5秒
随后, 在当前房间中失去金牛座移速加成

source.title: Aries
body: +0.25 Speed up
Running into enemies while at a high speed will deal 25 damage. Moving at this speed also prevents contact damage
Will not deal contact damage unless you are moving fast enough (at least 0.85 speed)
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 白羊座
body: 移速大于0.85时, 对敌人造成18点接触伤害

source.title: Cancer
body: +3 Soul Hearts
After getting hit once, you gain a damage reduction for the rest of the room similar to The Wafer item (-50% damage taken)
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 巨蟹座
body: +3魂心
受伤后, 在当前房间中后续所受伤害降低为半心

source.title: Leo
body: Isaac increases in size, gets a lion's mane and now has the ability to crush rocks by walking over them
Crushed rocks and poop can fill holes if you walk in their direction
Allows you to crush Red Poops and sometimes not take damage. However, If you also have flying you will always take damage
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums
Counts as 1 of 3 size-increasing items needed towards the Stompy transformation

translation.title: 狮子座
body: 体型变大
粉碎接触的石头

source.title: Virgo
body: A random chance when you take damage to get an invincibility shield for 7 seconds
The chance to get an invincibility shield is affected by your luck stat and at +10 Luck it will activate every time you get hit
Converts all negative pills into their positive counterparts e.g. Stat Down becomes Stat Up, 'Bad Trip' turns into 'Balls of Steel' and 'Amnesia' turns into 'I can see forever'
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 室女座
body: 受伤时, 概率获得10秒无敌
将负面胶囊变成正面的

source.title: Libra
body: Gives you 6 keys, 6 bombs and 6 coins
Balances out your main stats to bring the high and low stats closer to an average value
All future stat upgrading items will now instead spread out across all other stats. For example, an item which usually gives +1 Damage would instead give a small 'all stats up'
Stats effected by this item are: Damage, Tears, Range, Speed
When taken with another item which gives an extreme value in a certain stat (e.g. Soy Milk) can lead to interesting synergies
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 天秤座
body: +6硬币, 炸弹, 钥匙
平衡角色属性
后续的属性变化会分散到各个属性

source.title: Scorpio
body: Isaac's tears turn bright green and always apply a poison effect to enemies which deals a total of double your tear damage
This is essentially a superior version of The Common Cold item
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 天蝎座
body: 有毒泪弹

source.title: Sagittarius
body: +0.2 Speed Up
Grants piercing tears
Tears do not travel through rocks with this item
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 人马座
body: 穿刺泪弹

source.title: Capricorn
body: +1 HP Up
+0.5 Damage Up
-1 Tear Delay (Tears Up)
+0.1 Speed Up
+0.75 Range Up
+1 Key, +1 Bomb, +1 Coin
Heals one red heart container when picked up
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 摩羯座
body: ↑ +1心之容器
↑ 射击延迟-1
+1硬币, 炸弹, 钥匙

source.title: Aquarius
body: Leaves a trail of tears on the floor behind Isaac which damages enemies that walk over it for 2 damage per tick
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums
Aquarius synergizes with tear effects

translation.title: 宝瓶座
body: 角色留下水迹
水迹每秒造成6点伤害

source.title: Pisces
body: -1 Tear Delay (Tears Up)
x1.25 Tear Size Up
Tears now have a bigger knockback effect, which pushes enemies backwards
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 双鱼座
body: ↑ 射击延迟-1
↑ 泪弹尺寸x1.25
提高泪弹击退力

source.title: Eve's Mascara
body: x2 Damage Multiplier
Tears Down by exactly half (Tear delay * 2)
-0.5 Shot Speed Down
The tears down from this item is a x2.0 multiplier after the formula, meaning it will always halve your tear rate (Unless you have Monstro's Lung or Soy Milk)
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Eve

translation.title: 夏娃的睫毛膏
body: ↑ 伤害修正x2
↓ 射速修正x0.5

source.title: Judas' Shadow
body: When you die with this item, you respawn in the previous room as Dark Judas with 2 black hearts for health
Dark Judas has a damage multiplier of 2.00 (double Isaac's damage) and an additional +0.1 Speed
Dark Judas is considered a separate character by the game, however he can be used to unlock Judas' secrets/achievements
Dark Judas cannot gain red heart containers, HP upgrades give soul hearts instead
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Judas

translation.title: 犹大的影子
body: 死亡时, 以伤害修正x2的犹大之影重生

source.title: Maggy's Bow
body: +1 HP Up
Heals one red heart container when picked up
All future red hearts now heal for double. Half hearts heal a whole heart and full hearts heal 2 red hearts
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Maggy

translation.title: 抹大拉的蝴蝶结
body: ↑ +1心之容器
所有红心治疗量翻倍

source.title: Holy Mantle
body: Each time you enter a new room, damage is negated for the first time you get hit
Can be used to go in and out of a Curse Room without taking damage
Counts as 1 of 3 angel items needed towards the Seraphim transformation
The Lost starts with this item after donating 879 coins to the Greed Donation Machine.
REPENTANCE - The Lost's Holy Mantle can no longer be re-rolled using an item like D4.

translation.title: 神圣屏障
body: 阻挡每个房间第一次受到的伤害

source.title: Thunder Thighs
body: +1 HP Up
-0.4 Speed Down
You can now break obstacles by walking over them
Heals one red heart container when picked up
Holes in the ground can be filled by crushing adjacent rocks, similar to how this can be done with bombs
Allows you to crush Red Poops and sometimes not take damage. However, If you also have flying you will always take damage

translation.title: 霹雳大腿
body: ↑ +1心之容器
角色摧毁接触的石头

source.title: Strange Attractor
body: Enemies and pickups (keys, bombs etc.) are now magnetically attracted to Isaac's tears
Can cause some enemies to have unpredictable movement

translation.title: 怪异磁铁
body: 角色的泪弹吸引敌人, 掉落物和饰品

source.title: Cursed Eye
body: Tears are now charged up and fired rapidly in a burst of up to 5 shots at once
The amount of tears fired in the charge depends on how long you charge for

The eye has three states, white (not firing), black (first second of charging) and blinking between black and white. If you get hit while Cursed eye is a solid black colour you are guaranteed to be teleported to another random room on the floor. If you get hit in either of the other 2 states you will not be teleported
The Black Candle item will remove the Cursed Eye's teleportation effect
REPENTANCE - Burst now has 5 shots instead of 4

translation.title: 诅咒之眼
body: 蓄力发射4颗泪弹
蓄力未满时受伤会将角色传送至随机房间

source.title: Mysterious Liquid
body: When Isaac's tears hit anything, they leave a green toxic creep on the floor that damages enemies for 1 damage per tick

translation.title: 神秘液体
body: 角色的泪弹会留下水迹
水迹每秒造成30点伤害

source.title: Gemini
body: A familar that is attached to Isaac, which will seek out and damage any enemies close by for 3 contact damage
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums

translation.title: 双子座
body: 近战跟班
每秒造成6点接触伤害

source.title: Cain's Other Eye
body: A familiar eye that follows Isaac and copies all his tear modifiers/effects, but shoots in random directions
Tears from this familiar deal 75% of Isaac's tear damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Cain

translation.title: 该隐的另一只眼
body: 在房间中四处漂浮
与角色同方向发射, 造成1x角色伤害

source.title: ???'s Only Friend
body: A familiar fly that can be moved around via use of the arrow keys dealing 2.5 contact damage per tick, similar to the Ludovico Technique's mechanic
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Blue Baby

translation.title: ???唯一的朋友
body: 可控制的苍蝇
每秒造成37.5点接触伤害

source.title: Samson's Chains
body: An iron ball and chain attached to Isaac, similar to Guppy's Hairball that you can fling around to deal 5 damage per tick
The ball will block enemy shots and can also destroy environmental objects such as rocks, mushrooms and skulls
Does not decrease your movement speed stat at all however the ball has to be dragged around causing Isaac to slow down slightly when the chain is fully extended
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Samson

translation.title: 参孙的脚镣
body: 可拖动的球, 能够摧毁石头
每秒造成10.7点接触伤害

source.title: Mongo Baby
body: A familiar that will follow Isaac and copy the effect of one of your other familiars
If you don't have any other familiars, he will just shoot normal tears
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation
REPENTANCE - Removed the double damage multiplier on Mongo Baby's attacks

translation.title: 蒙戈宝宝
body: 复制其他跟班的泪弹效果
造成2x所复制跟班的伤害
若没有跟班, 则发射普通的3.5伤害泪弹

source.title: Isaac's Tears
body: A spacebar item that fires 8 of Isaac's tears in a circle around him
Tears spawned from this item keep most effect that Isaac currently has applied to his tears, and deal an additional +5 flat damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with Isaac

translation.title: 以撒的泪盆
body: 向8个方向发射泪弹
泪弹复制角色泪弹的效果
发射泪弹时充能

source.title: Undefined
body: Upon use, teleports you to one of the following rooms at random: Item room, Secret room, Super secret room, the I AM ERROR room or the Black Market (very low chance)
There are no I AM ERROR rooms on the final floors, preventing looping with this item
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Eden

translation.title: 未定义
body: 传送至宝箱房/隐藏房/超级隐藏房/错误房

source.title: Scissors
body: When used will cut your head from your body. Isaac's head will remain stationary and fire tears. His body can be controlled and spews blood nearby
Tears fired by the head do a flat 3.5 damage and don't scale

REPENTANCE - Scissors has been redesigned. The stationary head is now affected by Isaac's stats and attack modifiers, and the body will spew a controllable fountain of blood shots. Charge time increased to 4 (from 2)
source.unlock: Unlock this item by dying 100 times

translation.title: 剪刀
body: 当前房间中将角色的头变为不动的跟班
头发射泪弹造成3.5点伤害
独立控制角色身体, 仍发射角色的泪弹

source.title: Breath of Life
body: Holding the active item button will deplete the charge bar. When the charge bar gets to zero it will grant you a brief period of invincibility
If the spacebar is held for too long (about 1 second) when it has no charge, you will take damage
During the invincibility period, Isaac deals 3.5 contact damage to enemies and beams of light will strike down from the sky, dealing 15 damage
If damage is blocked perfectly at the exact second the charge bar reaches zero, it will release holy beams in four directions and grant a brief shile effect
The invincibility effect is shown via a rapid flashing animation

translation.title: 生命之息
body: 按住使用键时消耗充能条
充能条为空时角色暂时无敌
按住过久会对角色造成伤害

source.title: The Polaroid
body: After taking damage, if you have half a red heart or less, The Polaroid will give you an invincibility shield for 5 seconds
Grants access to the Chest floor
Allows you to open the door at the beginning of Depths II that leads to the Mausoluem
When unlocked, is guaranteed to drop after the Mom's Foot boss fight
The Polaroid will always spawn on the left pedestal
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Isaac in the Cathedral 5 times

translation.title: 全家福
body: 若不多于半红心时受伤, 则获得5秒无敌

source.title: The Negative
body: +1.0 Damage Up
After taking damage, if you have half a red heart or less, The Negative will deal 40 damage to all enemies in the room
Gives you access to the Dark Room floor
Allows you to open the door at the beginning of Depths II that leads to the Mausoluem
When unlocked, is guaranteed to drop after the Mom's Foot boss fight
The Negative will always spawn on the right pedestal
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Satan in Sheol 5 times

translation.title: 底片
body: 若不多于半红心时受伤, 则对房间中所有敌人造成伤害

source.title: The Ludovico Technique
body: You no longer shoot tears and instead now control a single large tear with the arrow keys
Items which increase your tears stat will cause the tear to deal damage at a faster rate
Items which increase your shot speed cause the tear to travel faster across the screen
Ludo and Brimstone create a large controllable red ring of death that does massive damage to anything in its path
Taking this with Mom's Knife allows you to remote control the knife around the room, dealing huge damage

translation.title: 鲁多维科科技
body: 角色的泪弹由1颗巨大的可控泪弹取代

source.title: Soy Milk
body: Very high Tears Up: Tears * 5.5
-80% Damage Down
x0.5 Tear Size
REPENTANCE - Soy Milk tears now cause drastically less knockback

translation.title: 豆奶
body: ↑ 射速修正x4
↑ 发射延迟-2
↓ 伤害修正x0.2
↓ 泪弹尺寸x0.5

source.title: Godhead
body: Isaac's tears become homing and have an aura around them, which will deal a flat 2 damage per tick to anything inside its radius
+0.5 Damage Up
-0.3 Tears Down
-0.3 Shot Speed Down
Multiple GodHeads doesn't stack the aura damage
Counts as 1 of 3 angel items needed towards the Seraphim transformation.
source.unlock: Unlock this item by completing all post-it note marks in hard mode with The Lost character

translation.title: 神性
body: 追踪泪弹
泪弹具有光环, 每秒造成4.5x角色伤害

source.title: Lazarus' Rags
body: Gives Isaac an extra life on death, exactly the same as Lazarus' default respawn effect
When you die with this item, you respawn in the same room with 1 heart and the Anemic item
The game considers you to be a different character (Lazarus II) when this effect activates
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with Lazarus

translation.title: 拉撒路的绷带
body: 死亡时, 以'复活的拉撒路'重生

source.title: The Mind
body: Gives Isaac a full mapping effect, revealing the entire floor and locations of all secret rooms
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Satan with The Lost

translation.title: 思想
body: 获得完整的地图效果

source.title: The Body
body: +3 Health Up
The three heart containers are pre-filled with red hearts
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Chest with The Lost

translation.title: 肉体
body: ↑ +3心之容器

source.title: The Soul
body: +2 Soul Hearts
Enemy projectiles will now slowly curve away from Isaac and avoid hitting him
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Dark Room with The Lost

translation.title: 灵魂
body: +2魂心
获得排斥敌人和弹幕的光环

source.title: Dead Onion
body: Isaac's tears become large, brown and will penetrate all objects and enemies (piercing + spectral)
-1.2 Range Down
-0.4 Shot Speed Down
x1.5 Tear Size
Despite the increase in tear size, Dead Onion does NOT increase your damage stat. It also doesn't do poison damage despite having the tagline 'toxic aura tears'

translation.title: 烂洋葱
body: ↑ 泪弹尺寸x1.5
↓ -0.5泪弹高度
穿刺灵体泪弹

source.title: Broken Watch
body: Upon entering every 4th unexplored room, the Broken Watch will either slow down or speed up all enemies in the room
The slow effect is much more common than the speed up
An item only found in the Shop item pool

translation.title: 损坏的怀表
body: 每4个房间减速一次
13%概率由加速取代

source.title: Boomerang
body: A blue boomerang which can be thrown in a similar fashion to Mom's Knife, to stun any enemies it hits and deal damage
The damage dealt by the Boomerang is equal to double your tear damage
The boomerang can also be used to grab pickups and consumables from a distance, similar to the legend of zelda boomerang
The range of the boomerang is affected by range, with number one the distance is very short and makes the item a lot less effective
The Boomerang can be used to kill shopkeeper corpses, allowing you to farm their drops for coins, items, Steam Sale etc
REPENTANCE - Boomerang is now piercing, and has far less downtime between throwing it and being able to fire tears again

translation.title: 回旋镖
body: 可投掷的回旋镖
使敌人石化并造成2x角色伤害
可带回物品

source.title: Safety Pin
body: +1.5 Range Up
+0.16 Shot Speed Up
+1 Black Heart
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect

translation.title: 安全别针
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+0.5
+1黑心

source.title: Caffeine Pill
body: +0.3 Speed Up
Decreases the size of Isaac, and your player hitbox, making you less likely to be hit
Gives you a random pill when picked up
An item only found in the boss room pool

translation.title: 咖啡因片
body: ↑ 体型变小
生成1随机胶囊

source.title: Torn Photo
body: +0.7 Tears Up
+0.16 Shot Speed Up

source.title: Blue Cap
body: +1 HP Up
+0.7 Tears Up
-0.16 Shot Speed Down
Heals one red heart container when picked up
An item only found in the Boss Room pool
Counts as 1 of 3 mushroom items needed towards the Fun Guy transformation

translation.title: 蓝盖蘑菇
body: ↑ +1心之容器

source.title: Latch Key
body: +1 Luck Up
+1 Soul Heart
Spawns 2 keys on the ground

translation.title: 弹簧锁钥匙
body: ↑ 幸运+1
+1魂心
生成2钥匙

source.title: Match Book
body: +1 Black Heart
+3 Bombs
When depleted, Black Hearts deal 40 damage to the entire room, in a Necronomicon style effect
REPENTANCE - Also drops the Match Stick trinket

translation.title: 火柴盒
body: +1黑心
生成3炸弹

source.title: Synthoil
body: +1.0 Damage Up
+1.5 Range Up
Counts as 1 of 3 syringe items needed towards the Spun transformation

translation.title: 合成油脂
body: ↑ 伤害+1
↑ 泪弹高度+0.5

source.title: A Snack
body: +1 HP Up
Heals one red heart container when picked up

translation.title: 零食
body: ↑ +1心之容器

source.title: Diplopia
body: A one-time use item which when used, will duplicate any pedestal items or consumables in the current room
If used in a shop, the duplicated items can be taken for free
If used on a trinket, another random trinket will spawn instead of a duplicate
If used in the Boss Rush, all the duplicates can be taken for free as well as one of the original items
If used in a Devil Room or Black Market, the duplicates can be taken for free

translation.title: 复视
body: 复制房间中所有底座道具和掉落物

source.title: Placebo
body: When used, copies the effect of the pill you are currently holding without consuming it
The charge time of this item depends on the quality of the pill you're holding
Does not copy effects of Cards or Runes

translation.title: 安慰剂
body: 触发角色持有胶囊的效果

source.title: Wooden Nickel
body: When used, has a 50% chance to drop one random type of coin (penny, nickel or dime)
Keeper starts with this item after beating Isaac with Keeper
source.unlock: Unlock this item by donating 33 coins to the Greed Donation Machine

translation.title: 木制镍币
body: 56%概率生成1随机硬币

source.title: Toxic Shock
body: With this item, at the start of every room you will deal double your tear damage to the entire room in a poison effect
Enemies killed now also leave a pool of creep on the ground where they died. This deals 1 damage per tick
High tear damage will cause this item to become very powerful for rooms with a lot of enemies, since they can die instantly and render the room harmless
Enemies which spawn after the first few seconds of each room are not affected by this item, e.g. Flies spawned from a Mulligan dying

translation.title: 毒性休克
body: 进入房间时, 使所有敌人中毒
被毒死的敌人留下水迹
水迹每秒造成30点伤害

source.title: Mega Bean
body: When used, the Mega Bean will freeze all enemies in the current room for a couple of seconds, deal 5 damage and poison any enemies in close proximity and send a wave of spikes across the room in the direction you are facing
The enemies in close range will take 5 damage then have a poison over time effect which deals your tear damage 4 or 6 times
The spike wave will deal 10 damage to any enemies in contact with it
Can be used to open secret rooms

translation.title: 超级豆子
body: 使房间中所有敌人石化
造成5点伤害并使附近敌人中毒
向角色移动方向发出岩石波
岩石波可打开隐藏房和粉碎石头

source.title: Glass Cannon
body: Glass Cannon allows you to fire one huge spectral tear that deals a lot of damage.
When taking damage, the cannon will break and remain broken until recharged (Recharge time: 4 rooms)
When you take damage and the cannon breaks, you take an additional 2 full hearts of damage and gain the Anemic effect for the room.
The damage done by Glass Cannon is calculated as follows: dmg = (dmg * 10) + 10 (i.e. at base damage of 3.5, that's 45 damage)
Self-inflicted damage such as Blood Donation machines don't trigger this effect

translation.title: 玻璃大炮
body: 发射炮弹会将角色血量降至半心
发射一颗巨大的穿刺灵体泪弹, 造成10x角色伤害+10的伤害

source.title: Bomber Boy
body: +5 bombs
Isaac's bombs will now explode in a large cross-shaped pattern (roughly 5 bombs explosions wide)
This also affects troll bombs

translation.title: 炸弹人
body: +5炸弹
炸弹十字爆炸

source.title: Crack Jacks
body: +1 HP Up
Spawns a random trinket on the floor

translation.title: 琥珀爆米花
body: ↑ +1心之容器
生成1饰品

source.title: Mom's Pearls
body: +0.38 Range Up
+1 Luck Up
+1 Soul Heart
Counts as 1 of 3 mom items needed towards the Mom transformation

translation.title: 妈妈的珍珠项链
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+0.5
↑ 幸运+1

source.title: Car Battery
body: The Car Battery causes your spacebar item to activate twice on each use
For example, with Yum Heart you would heal 2 full red hearts instead of 1

translation.title: 车载电池
body: 使用主动道具时触发效果两次

source.title: Box of Friends
body: Upon use, gives you a duplicate of each familiar you have for the current room
It will not 'double' your familiars as the tagline suggests - if you have 2 of one kind, it will only give you an extra one
If the familiar only appears when taking damage (i.e. Dead Bird) then Box of Friends will cause it to spawn but won't create duplicates
This can be used multiple times in the same room to generate more familiars, meaning you can get a level 4 meatboy or bandage girl by using this item 3 times in the same room
If used when you have no familiars, it will give you a Demon Baby temporarily
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Lilith

translation.title: 朋友盒
body: 在当前房间复制所有跟班
若没有跟班, 则在当前房间获得1个恶魔宝宝

source.title: The Wiz
body: Isaac wears a dunce hat and fires 2 tears at once diagonally, similar to the R U A WIZARD pill tear pattern
Gives Isaac spectral tears which allows them to travel through objects in the environment (i.e. rocks)

translation.title: 蠢巫帽
body: 灵体泪弹
同时对角发射2颗泪弹

source.title: 8 Inch Nails
body: +1.5 Damage Up
Replaces Isaac's tears with nails, which have increased knockback
The increased knockback will also affect Brimstone, which usually has no knockback at all

translation.title: 八寸钉
body: 提高击退力

source.title: Incubus
body: Gives you a familiar demon incubus that follows you and shoots tears that scale with your own tears in terms of damage, stats and also effects
It will mimic any tear effects you currently have and also copy your current stats, meaning it will fire with the same damage, fire rate and range
Lilith starts with this item
Incubus' damage is reduced by 25% when playing as characters other than Lilith
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Lilith

translation.title: 淫魔
body: 发射泪弹, 效果和属性与角色一致

source.title: Fate's Reward
body: A familiar blue head that will follow Isaac and fire tears copying his tear damage and effects
This familiar is very similar to Incubus, however it only copies damage and is not affected by tears or range upgrades
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with ??? (Blue baby)

translation.title: 宿命的报答
body: 发射泪弹, 效果和属性与角色一致
射速是其他跟班的一半

source.title: Lil Chest
body: A familiar chest that follows Isaac and has a 25% chance to drop a pickup after clearing a room
Possible drops include hearts, coins, bombs, key, pills, card, runes, batteries, trinket
There's a 10% chance to spawn a trinket
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Isaac

translation.title: 小箱子
body: 清理房间后, 33%概率生成1随机掉落物

source.title: Sworn Protector
body: An orbital angel which does 7 contact damage per tick and blocks shots
The angel will attract bullets towards it and block them
Sworn Protector will drop an eternal heart if it blocks 10 shots in one room. Can only happen once per room
Visually this is almost identical to the Guardian Angel item, but without a face
Counts as 1 of 3 angel items needed towards the Seraphim transformation
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with The Lost

translation.title: 宣誓守护者
body: 环绕物
每秒造成105点接触伤害
吸引并阻挡弹幕
在1个房间中阻挡10颗弹幕时, 生成1永恒之心

source.title: Friend Zone
body: A white orbiting fly which deals 3 contact damage per tick to enemies
This familiar orbits Isaac at a middle length distance somewhere between Distant Admiration and Forever Alone
Counts as 1 of 3 fly items needed towards the Beelzebub transformation

translation.title: 浅交朋友
body: 中范围苍蝇环绕物
每秒造成45点接触伤害

source.title: Lost Fly
body: A familiar fly that moves in a straight line and attaches itself to the first obstacle or wall it comes into contact with in each room.
If any enemies walk into its path, it will deal 7 contact damage every 7 frames
Nearby enemies will be forced to target and attack it
If the obstacle it is attached to is destroyed then it will continue rolling in the direction it was previously travelling until it meets another wall or obstacle

translation.title: 迷路苍蝇
body: 沿着房间中的墙/障碍物行进
每秒造成105点接触伤害

source.title: Scatter Bombs
body: +5 bombs
Causes your bombs to explode into 2-4 tiny bombs
The smaller bombs deal half damage and have a smaller explosion area. They also retain most of your bomb synergizing items

translation.title: 分裂炸弹
body: +5炸弹
角色的炸弹会炸成2-4个小炸弹

source.title: Sticky Bombs
body: This item causes your bombs to stick to enemies and when exploding will leave white creep on the ground which slows enemies
When one of your bombs kills an enemy, a bunch of blue spiders are spawned to fight by your side, which deal x2 your current damage
+5 Bombs
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 粘性炸弹
body: +5炸弹
角色的炸弹会粘在敌人身上
用炸弹击杀敌人会生成蓝蜘蛛

source.title: Epiphora
body: Shooting in one direction increases your fire rate until a cap is reached
The maximum effect is to halve your delay, which takes roughly 10 seconds to achieve
The accuracy of your tears is also reduced as your fire rate increases
As soon as you change firing direction, your fire rate is reset to its normal amount

translation.title: 溢泪症
body: ↑ 持续向单方向发射会逐渐降低射击延迟, 最多降至50%

source.title: Continuum
body: +3 Range Up
Tears will now travel through walls and appear out of the opposite wall, similar to a portal-type mechanic
Your tears can now also travel over rocks and objects in the environment

translation.title: 连续统
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+1.5
灵体泪弹
泪弹会过屏幕, 从另一边回来

source.title: Mr. Dolly
body: +0.7 Tears Up
+1.5 Range Up
Spawns 3 random types of hearts on the floor

translation.title: 玩偶先生
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+0.5
生成3随机心

source.title: Curse of The Tower
body: Causes Isaac to spawn 6 troll bombs on the floor every time he gets hit, similar to the Anarchist Cookbook mechanic
Doesn't trigger on damage taken from blood donation machines and devil beggars (but still triggers on other forms of intentional self damage such as IV Bag)

translation.title: 塔之诅咒
body: 受伤时, 生成6个即爆炸弹
该炸弹继承角色的炸弹效果

source.title: Charged Baby
body: A familiar baby that has a random chance to drop a battery pickup or freeze all enemies in the room for a short while
Charged Baby also has a chance to add one charge to your spacebar item
These effects can only occur while in a hostile room with enemies

translation.title: 充电宝宝
body: 在未清理的房间中, 每30秒产生以下效果之一:
生成1电池(每房间最多2次)
为主动道具充能1格(每房间最多2次)
将房间中所有敌人石化

source.title: Dead Eye
body: Gives Isaac a +25% damage up for every tear that successfully hits an enemy
The bonus from Dead Eye maxes out at double your damage (+100%)
If a tear misses an enemy, there is a chance for the multiplier to be reset back to 1. It's a 20% chance on first miss, 33% for a second miss and 50% for anything beyond that
Piercing shots work with this item and multiple hits with a single tear will each give a damage bonus

translation.title: 死亡之眼
body: ↑ 每次成功击中敌人伤害+25%(最高+100%)
未击中时, 概率重置修正

source.title: Holy Light!
body: Isaac has a random chance to fire a Holy tear, which when it hits an enemy, will spawn a light beam on the same enemy, dealing damage
The beams from this item deal damage equal to 400% of your tear damage (4x damage multiplier for the beams only)
The chance to fire a Holy tear is affected by your luck stat, maxing out at a 50% chance
Counts as 1 of 3 angel items needed towards the Seraphim transformation.

translation.title: 圣光
body: 10%概率发射圣光泪弹, 击中时会产生光柱
幸运9: 50%概率
光柱造成4x角色伤害

source.title: Host Hat
body: A familiar host that sits on Isaac's head and has a 20% chance to block enemy shots
When a shot is blocked, Host Hat will fire 3 bullets back at the enemy
Causes you to become immune to explosions, but doesn't protect against stomps or shockwaves
Blocks damage from projectiles falling from above

translation.title: 寄居骷髅帽
body: 免疫爆炸, 岩石波, 践踏的伤害
20%概率阻挡弹幕

source.title: Restock
body: Causes your shops to instantly restock their items when you buy them
New items generated by Restock are from the shop item pool
The cost increases exponentially every time you purchase an item. For Items it increases by 2 coins * the number of purchases. For everything it increases by 1 coin * the number of purchases
The max price of an item is always 99c with this item
Works with Keeper's Box and the Member Card extra shop

translation.title: 补货
body: 生成3随机掉落物
商店物品购买后会立刻补货

source.title: Bursting Sack
body: Most spider enemies no longer target or deal contact damage to Isaac
This is very similar to a Skatole for spiders instead of flies
Counts as 1 of 3 spider items needed towards the Spider Baby transformation.

translation.title: 爆裂虫卵
body: 蜘蛛类敌人不再以角色为目标, 也不对角色造成接触伤害

source.title: No. 2
body: Continuously firing or charging tears for 3 seconds causes Isaac to fart and drop a Butt Bomb
Only 1 Butt Bomb can be dropped per charge, so you'll need to stop firing then start again to drop another one
Butt Bombs explode for 50 damage like normal bombs, but also deal 10 damage to all enemies in the room and daze them for a short period of time
Counts as 1 of 3 poop items needed towards the Oh Crap transformation.

translation.title: 大号
body: 持续发射3秒后, 生成1大便炸弹

source.title: Pupula Duplex
body: Transforms Isaac's tears into a wide arc shape which doubles their size and hitbox
Gives Isaac spectral tears which allows them to travel through objects in the environment (i.e. rocks)

translation.title: 双瞳
body: ↑ 泪弹尺寸x2
灵体泪弹

source.title: Pay To Play
body: +5 coins
This item turns all doors that require a key into doors which need a coin to enter instead
This affects shops, item rooms, libraries, double locked doors, key blocks, chests and other key doors
Changes the appearance of doors and objects that this item works on to show a coin slot instead of a keyhole

translation.title: 充钱游戏
body: +5硬币
单钥匙门必须用硬币打开而不是钥匙

source.title: Eden's Blessing
body: +0.7 Tears Up
Gives you a random item at the start of your next run (You need to start a fresh run to receive the item)
Important progression items such as Key Pieces or the Mom's Shovel pieces cannot be given by Eden's Blessing
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Eden

translation.title: 伊甸的祝福
body: 下一局开始时, 获得1随机道具

source.title: Friendly Ball
body: When used, can be thrown at enemies to capture them (similar to a Poké Ball)
After capturing an enemy, the next use of the Friendly Ball will re-spawn the same enemy as a friendly companion which will attack other enemies
The companion will persist between rooms and floors until it dies by taking enough damage
Walking over the thrown ball after capturing an enemy will immediately recharge it

translation.title: 友好球
body: 可以扔向敌人将其捕捉
下一次使用则会生成相同的友好敌人

source.title: Tear Detonator
body: When used, will detonate any tears currently on the screen and cause each one to split into 6 more tears which will fire in a circle, similar to Tammy's Head
Luck-based items such as Holy Light are applied to each tear individually

translation.title: 眼泪引爆器
body: 引爆屏幕中的泪弹, 每颗泪弹分裂为6颗并以环状散开

source.title: Lil Gurdy
body: Gives Isaac a familiar Gurdy that will charge around the room dealing contact damage to enemies
The Gurdy is charged by holding down the fire button and letting go. The longer the button is held the faster Gurdy will fling itself across the screen
Deals a fixed amount of damage depending on charge level, at lowest being ~5 and at max being ~20
Lil Gurdy bounces off of enemies and obstacles

translation.title: 肉山宝宝
body: 弹出并在房间中反弹, 速度基于蓄力时间
根据蓄力时间, 每秒造成5-90点接触伤害

source.title: Bumbo
body: A beggar head which floats around the room and picks up any nearby coins. Every 6 coins Bumbo will evolve to a new form except for level 4 which takes 12 coins
Level 2: Bumbo gains a body and crawls around the room, sometimes dropping random pickups
Level 3: It now fires tears in the same direction Isaac does
Level 4: Bumbo no longer fires tears but instead will chase enemies slowly and deal contact damage. It will also sometimes randomly drop bombs

After reaching level 4 (and at a much lower chance before level 4), Bumbo will also continue to collect coins and drop random pickups, similar to the Bum Friend item, but can also drop pedestal items very rarely.

translation.title: 乞丐宝
body: 捡起附近的硬币
捡起7, 13, 25硬币时升级
2级: 清理房间后, 概率生成掉落物或道具
3级: 发射泪弹, 击中时概率生成硬币
4级: 追击敌人, 每秒造成37.5点接触伤害
4级: 继续捡硬币, 能生成掉落物或道具

source.title: D12
body: When used, the D12 re-rolls any rocks into another random type of object (e.g. poop, pots, TNT, red poop, stone blocks, spikes, fireplaces etc.)
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Cain

translation.title: 十二面骰
body: 将障碍物重置为其他随机类型的障碍物(大便/罐子/TNT/红大便/石头等)

source.title: Censer
body: Gives Isaac a familiar golden Censer which creates a huge aura of light that slows down any enemies inside it
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Maggy

translation.title: 香炉
body: 产生大片光环, 能够使其中的敌人和弹幕减速

source.title: Key Bum
body: A familiar beggar similar to Bum Friend that follows Isaac and collects keys, giving random chests in return
Doesn't pick up golden keys
Counts as 1 of 3 bum items needed towards the Super Bum transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Lazarus

translation.title: 钥匙乞丐
body: 捡起附近的钥匙
生成随机宝箱作为回报

source.title: Rune Bag
body: A bag that follows Isaac and drops a random Rune or Soul Stone every 7 or 8 rooms
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating the Isaac boss with Lilith

translation.title: 符文袋
body: 每5-6个房间生成1随机符文

source.title: Seraphim
body: A familiar angel which follows Isaac and fires Sacred Heart tears which deal 10 damage at -25% shot speed and a reduced fire rate
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.

translation.title: 撒拉弗
body: 发射圣心泪弹
泪弹造成10点伤害

source.title: Betrayal
body: This item causes enemy projectiles to be able to hit other enemies. When an enemy takes damage from an enemy projectile, it will attempt to target the enemy that fired it
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Judas

translation.title: 背叛
body: 受伤时, 魅惑房间中所有敌人

source.title: Zodiac
body: Zodiac will give you a random zodiac item effect that changes after every floor
Possible item effects include: Taurus, Aries, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Gemini or Pisces
Counts as 1 of 3 astrology items needed in the same run to unlock Planetariums
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with The Lost

translation.title: 黄道十二宫
body: 每层获得1个随机星座道具效果

source.title: Serpent's Kiss
body: Tears now have a random chance to apply a poison effect, dealing damage equal to your tears each tick, for 2 ticks
Isaac now deals poison damage on contact with enemies similar to The Virus item (Damage over time 4 or 6 per tick)
Enemies that were poisoned by contact damage have a 20% chance to drop a black sin heart when killed. Only contact poison has this effect - poison from tears doesn't work
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Satan with Lilith

translation.title: 蛇蝎之吻
body: 15%概率发射有毒泪弹
使接触的敌人中毒
中毒敌人死亡时, 20%概率掉落1黑心

source.title: Marked
body: Isaac will now fire tears automatically directed at a red target on the ground which is controlled by the player
This allows for a full 360 degree tear firing radius
Can be overridden by other tear modifiers such as Mom's Knife or Brimstone
Every time you leave the room this effect turns off until you press a shoot button again
+0.7 Tears Up
+3.0 Range Up
Has no effect with Lilith's Incubus

translation.title: 十字准星
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+0.3
角色自动向地上的可控红色标记发射泪弹

source.title: Tech X
body: Tears are replaced with the ability to charge and fire a laser ring that travels across the room
The size of the ring will depend on how long you charge it
The laser ring does damage scaling based on charge, from 25% at minimum to 100% at max
Rings have infinite range and travel until they hit a wall
Multiple Tech X stacks - every one taken adds another laser ring (doesn't affect your fire rate)

translation.title: 科技X
body: 角色的泪弹由可蓄力的激光环取代
激光环尺寸随蓄力时间增加

source.title: Ventricle Razor
body: Allows you to create one brown tunnel and one blue tunnel in the floor, that can be used to teleport between wherever you placed each one
This item will let you port out of the devil room but not back into it
Very useful in the boss rush and challenge rooms

translation.title: 心室手术刀
body: 创造最多2个传送门
可以在不同房间放置

source.title: Tractor Beam
body: Isaac's tears now travel directly forwards following a beam of light, but will also move sideways based on your player movement
+0.5 Tears Up
+1.5 Range Up
+0.16 Shot Speed Up
Allows for more accurate correction when firing tears, as their direction can be controlled even after they have been fired
If you switch the direction in which you are firing tears, the beam of light and all your tears will also be transported to the new direction

translation.title: 牵引光束
body: ↑ 泪弹高度+0.5
角色的泪弹受角色面前的光束指引

source.title: God's Flesh
body: Tears now have a random chance to apply a shrinking effect, causing enemies to shrink in size for 5 seconds and also run away from Isaac
Shrunk enemies can be crushed and killed by walking over them
Counts as 1 of 3 mushroom items needed towards the Fun Guy transformation

translation.title: 神体蘑菇
body: 10%概率发射使敌人缩小的泪弹
缩小的敌人可以被踩死

source.title: Maw of The Void
body: After firing tears for 3 seconds, a red cross appears on Isaac's head that, upon releasing the fire button, creates a black ring which deals a lot of damage to any enemies inside it
The ring deals damage equal to your tear damage rapidly to any enemies in contact with it, for a total of 30 ticks of damage
You have to keep the fire button held down for the full 3 seconds to cause this effect
Counts as 1 of 3 evil items needed towards the Leviathan transformation
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Azazel

translation.title: 虚空之喉
body: ↑ 伤害+1
持续发射泪弹2.35秒后, 松开发射键会产生黑硫磺火圈
黑圈在2秒内造成30x角色伤害
被黑圈击杀的敌人有5%概率掉落1黑心

source.title: Spear of Destiny
body: In addition to tears, Isaac now holds a spear infront of him which deals damage equal to 2 times your tear damage
The spear occasionally inflicts fear on enemies it damages.
The spear cannot be thrown like Mom's Knife but deals damage while it is in contact with an enemy

translation.title: 命运之矛
body: 在角色面前生成一根矛
每秒造成约8.57x角色伤害, 概率使接触到的敌人恐惧

source.title: Explosivo
body: Tears now have a random chance to become sticky bombs, which will attach to enemies and explode after a few seconds
The bomb explosion deals your tear damage + 60
Explosivo shots deal regular tear damage upon sticking to an enemy

translation.title: 爆炸物
body: 25%概率发射粘性炸弹泪弹
泪弹击中时不造成伤害, 几秒后爆炸

source.title: Chaos
body: Causes all item pedestals to be chosen from a random item pool instead of the pre-defined ones which normally exist
When picked up, drops between 1-6 random pickups on the floor
Makes it possible to see items that have been rerolled away, preventing emptying the item pool and Breakfasting
Fixed item drops won't be replaced - e.g. Cube of Meat after defeating a Horseman
Chaos assigns a weight to item pools based on how many items are in the pool. The more items in a pool, the more likely that pool will be picked

translation.title: 混沌
body: 底座道具会从随机道具池产生
生成1-6随机掉落物

source.title: Spider Mod
body: A familiar grey spider that wanders around and allows you to see your tear damage and the health bars of all enemies
The spider will inflict a random status effect on any enemies it comes into contact with (e.g. slow, shrink, fear)
Spider Mod will also randomly drop battery consumables or blue spiders when a room is completed
For the sake of simplicity for players, all damage values displayed are multiplied by 10 and rounded to the nearest number
This item is a reference to Spider853, creator of Spidermod for the original game and one of the lead developers that worked on Rebirth and its DLCs

translation.title: 蜘蛛模组
body: 显示泪弹伤害和所有敌人的血条
接触敌人时, 施加随机状态效果
清理房间后, 概率生成蓝蜘蛛/小电池

source.title: Farting Baby
body: A familiar that follows Isaac and blocks tears
If a tear hits Farting Baby, there is a 10% chance for it to fart, with 3 possible effects: Charm, Poison or Knock back
Charm deals 5 damage. Poison deals 5 damage initially and then 3.5
Counts as 1 of 3 familiar items needed towards the Conjoined transformation.
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Isaac

translation.title: 放屁宝宝
body: 阻挡弹幕
受击时, 10%概率放屁, 效果为魅惑/中毒/击退三种其一

source.title: GB Bug
body: Spawns a familiar that follows Isaac.
Double tapping the fire button launches it forward, causing it to reroll the first monster, trinket, or pickup it hits
GB Bug respawns after a room has been cleared
Cannot reroll bosses - instead just deals 8 contact damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Eden

translation.title: 恶性漏洞
body: 在房间中漂浮
每秒造成120点接触伤害, 并施加随机状态效果
在有敌人的房间中, 接触掉落物时, 概率将其变成其他物品

source.title: D8
body: When used, the D8 rerolls all of your stats
Will only effect your damage, tears, range and speed stats
Each stat is given a multiplier that applies after all other adjustments
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Challenge #28 (Pride Day)

translation.title: 八面骰
body: 角色的伤害, 射速, 射程, 移速属性的修正x0.5-x2
修正在每次使用后重置

source.title: Purity
body: Purity will boost one of Isaac's stats depending on the colour of the aura around him
When you take damage, the aura will be removed and replaced with another random one when you enter the next room
Colour code is as follows:
Red = +4.0 Damage
Blue = -4 Tear Delay
Yellow = +0.5 Speed Up
Orange = +3.0 Range Up
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Maggy

translation.title: 纯洁
body: ↑ 根据光环颜色对角色属性进行增强
受伤时, 移除光环, 在下个房间获得新的光环
黄色 = ↑ 移速+0.5
蓝色 = ↑ 射击延迟-4
红色 = ↑ 伤害+4
橙色 = ↑ 射程+7.5, ↑ 泪弹高度+1

source.title: Athame
body: Adds a chance for a black ring to spawn around killed enemies, dealing damage to others that touch it
The ring damage scales with your tear damage
The chance for a ring to spawn scales with your luck stat
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Eve

translation.title: 祭祀之刃
body: 受伤时, 在角色周围产生黑色硫磺火圈
敌人被黑圈击杀时, 15%概率掉落1黑心

source.title: Empty Vessel
body: +2 Black Hearts

When Isaac has no red hearts, this item gives Isaac the ability to fly. Every 40 seconds spent in the same room since last activating, when the timer displays 00, 20 or 40 seconds, a shield triggers, nullifying all types of damage for 10 seconds
As soon as Isaac has half a red heart or more, this item deactivates
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Blue Womb (Hush) with Lazarus

translation.title: 空容器
body: +2黑心
角色没有红心时:
获得飞行
在有敌人的房间中, 每40秒产生1个持续10秒的护盾

source.title: Evil Eye
body: While firing tears this item gives you a chance to fire an eye across the screen with a very slow shot speed, which will fire tears of its own in the same direction as Isaac
The evil eye shots will be destroyed if they come into contact with enemies or obstacles
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Cain

translation.title: 邪恶之眼
body: 3.33%概率发射眼睛
幸运20: 10%概率
眼睛缓慢移动并发射与角色方向一致的泪弹

source.title: Lusty Blood
body: Each time Isaac kills an enemy, you get a temporary +0.5 damage up which lasts for the current room
Each subsequent kill will stack further damage up to a maximum of +5 Damage Up after 10 kills
This item is the same principle as the Bloody Lust item from the original flash game
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greed Mode with Samson

translation.title: 血嗜
body: ↑ 击杀敌人时, 在当前房间中伤害+0.5
最多击杀10个敌人伤害+5

source.title: Cambion Conception
body: After taking enough damage you will gain a permanent demon familiar
Possible familiars include: Dark Bum, Demon Baby, Leech, Lil' Brimstone, Succubus, Incubus, Lil Abaddon, Twisted Pair
The effect is shown visually in 3 stages with the character's belly getting larger each time until it finally gives birth to a familiar.
The first and second familiars spawn after 15 hits, then 30 hits for the third and fourth
Cambion Conception cannot grant more than 4 familiars in total
Lilith starts with this item
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating ??? with Lilith

translation.title: 恶魔受胎
body: 受伤15次, 30次, 60次, 90次时, 永久获得1个恶魔跟班
最多产生4个跟班

source.title: Immaculate Conception
body: After picking up 15 hearts, Isaac gains a permanent angelic familiar and a soul heart drops
Possible familiars include: Holy Water, Guardian Angel, Sworn Protector, The Relic and Seraphim
It is possible to get multiple followers by continuing to pick up hearts, at intervals of 15 hearts each
After all 5 familiars have spawned, it will just drop a soul heart every 15 hearts collected
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Boss Rush with Lilith

translation.title: 圣灵受胎
body: 每拾起15次心, 永久获得1个天使跟班并生成1魂心
最多产生5个跟班

source.title: More Options
body: Two items now spawn in each of your item rooms, however only one can be taken and the other will disappear
