source.title: Crow Heart
body: While held, any damage taken remove red hearts first, before soul hearts, black hearts and rotten heart damage
While at 1/2 of a red heart, it will begin to remove your other hearts again
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greedier mode with Eve

translation.title: 乌鸦的心
body: 受伤时, 首先消耗红心, 然后消耗魂心/黑心

source.title: Walnut
body: The Walnut has a chance to break when taking damage from an explosion. If it does, it will drop a random trinket, coin, heart and key
The Walnut trinket is destroyed once the effect activates

translation.title: 核桃
body: 受到1-9次爆炸后, 摧毁饰品并生成1随机心, 1硬币, 1钥匙和1随机饰品
不必要受伤

source.title: Duct Tape
body: Causes any orbitals you have to stop moving while held
Stops shooting familiars from moving (including Lilith's Incubus)
Some familiars with irregular movement are not affected by Duct Tape, such as Abel, BBF, Bumbo, Guppy's Hair Ball, Lil Gurdy, Punching Bag, Robo-Baby 2.0, Succubus

translation.title: 胶带
body: 跟班被粘住, 随角色同步移动

source.title: Silver Dollar
body: While held, shops will now appear on the womb floors (The Womb, Utero and Scarred Womb)
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Delirium in The Void floor with Cain

translation.title: 银币
body: 商店会出现在子宫层

source.title: Bloody Crown
body: While held, item rooms now appear on the womb floors (The Womb, Utero and Scarred Womb)
Causes item rooms to appear on the Corpse floors
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Delirium in The Void floor with Samson

translation.title: 染血王冠
body: 宝箱房会出现在子宫层

source.title: Pay To Win
body: While held, restock boxes will always spawn in item rooms

translation.title: 充钱游戏
body: 宝箱房永远生成补货机

source.title: Locust of War
body: Upon entering a room with enemies, spawns a Red Locust which detonates upon impact with enemies, dealing double tear damage for the impact of the Locust and 60 damage for the explosion
Can be dangerous as the fly will target the nearest enemy, which can be close enough to catch Isaac in its blast radius
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating Isaac in the Cathedral as Apollyon

translation.title: 战争蝗虫
body: 进入有敌人的房间时, 生成1只爆炸攻击的蝗虫
蝗虫造成2x角色伤害+60点爆炸伤害

source.title: Locust of Pestilence
body: At the start of each new hostile room you spawn a green attack fly, which will target a nearby enemy, deal double your tear damage and then poison them
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Satan with Apollyon

translation.title: 瘟疫蝗虫
body: 进入有敌人的房间时, 生成1只有毒攻击的蝗虫
蝗虫造成2x角色伤害

source.title: Locust of Famine
body: At the start of each new hostile room you spawn a yellow attack fly, which will target a nearby enemy, deal double your tear damage and apply a slowing effect to it
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating ??? in The Chest as Apollyon

translation.title: 饥荒蝗虫
body: 进入有敌人的房间时, 生成1只减速攻击的蝗虫
蝗虫造成2x角色伤害

source.title: Locust of Death
body: Upon entering a room with enemies, spawns a Black Locust that deals quadruple Isaac's damage, applied as two hits of double damage
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating The Lamb as Apollyon

translation.title: 死亡蝗虫
body: 进入有敌人的房间时, 生成1只攻击蝗虫
蝗虫造成4x角色伤害

source.title: Locust of Conquest
body: At the start of each new hostile room you spawn 2-5 white attack flies, which will target a nearby enemy and deal double your tear damage to it
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating Boss Rush as Apollyon

translation.title: 征服蝗虫
body: 进入有敌人的房间时, 生成1-4只攻击蝗虫
每只蝗虫造成2x角色伤害

source.title: Bat Wing
body: When killing an enemy, you have a very small chance to gain the ability to fly for the rest of the room
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating Greedier Mode with Azazel

translation.title: 蝙蝠翅膀
body: 击杀敌人后, 5%概率在当前房间中获得飞行

source.title: Stem Cell
body: Stem Cell heals Isaac's red heart containers to 50% each floor
If Isaac already has 50% health or more, it heals half of a heart instead
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating Greedier Mode with Samson

translation.title: 干细胞
body: 进入新一层时, 治疗半红心

source.title: Hairpin
body: Fully recharges your active item at the start of each boss fight
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Zaratus

translation.title: 发夹
body: 头目战开始时将主动道具充能

source.title: Wooden Cross
body: Gives you the Holy Mantle shield effect at the start of every new floor, which protects you from the next hit of damage you take
Does not recharge until the start of the next floor
Stacks with the effects from Holy Mantle and Blanket, but it does not stack with Holy Card
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Ep and Mills

translation.title: 木十字架
body: 阻挡每层第一次受到的伤害

source.title: Butter!
body: Using your active item while holding this trinket will drop it back on a pedestal on the ground
Also after taking damage, you have a very small chance to drop one of your passive items
One-time use active items will be consumed and not dropped
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by MarkusLeben and iguesti

translation.title: 黄油！
body: 使用主动道具会使其以底座道具的形式掉在地上
受伤时, 2%概率掉落角色持有的被动道具

source.title: Filigree Feather
body: Holding this trinket will cause the Angel mini bosses to drop normal items instead of Key Pieces
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #2, designed by Edmund McMillen

translation.title: 银丝羽毛
body: 天使头目掉落正常道具而不是钥匙部件

source.title: Door Stop
body: While held, the last door Isaac went through stays open, allowing him to leave the room even if enemies are in it
This trinket works on boss rooms (except Ultra Greed) and devil rooms containing Krampus, allowing you to exit out mid-fight
Does not drop in Greed mode
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by blowing up doors and secret room walls 50 times

translation.title: 门挡
body: 最后经过的门保持打开

source.title: Extension Cord
body: After being picked up, a yellow laser chain now flows through Isaac's familiars
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #4 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Strawrat and Aczom

translation.title: 扩接电线
body: 使跟班以电束相连
电束造成6点伤害

source.title: Rotten Penny
body: While held, spawns +1 friendly blue fly every time you pick up a coin
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #5. Based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Eufuu
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by having a lot of blue flies at once

translation.title: 腐烂硬币
body: 拾起硬币时, 生成1只蓝苍蝇

source.title: Baby-Bender
body: While held this trinket gives your familiars homing shots
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #5. Based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Ink Tears
source.unlock: Unlock this item by having two items or effects that grant homing shots at once (e.g. Spoon Bender, Telepathy for Dummies, I - The Magician)

translation.title: 儿童弯勺
body: 跟班的泪弹有追踪效果

source.title: Finger Bone
body: While held, gives you a 5% chance to gain a bone heart everytime you take damage
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #5
source.unlock: Unlock this trinket by defeating Ultra Greed as The Forgotten

translation.title: 指骨
body: 受伤时, 2%概率获得1骨心

source.title: O - The Fool
body: Teleports the player to the first room of the current floor

There is a guaranteed Fool card in the Depths 2, if you bomb the skull with an X on it. This is intended give you a guaranteed way to teleport out of the Mom's Foot fight, for accessing the path to the Mausoleum floor

translation.title: 0-愚者
body: 将角色传送至本层初始房间

source.title: I - The Magician
body: For the current room, tears now have the Spoon Bender effect, which allows them to curve towards enemies and gives them a purple appearance.

translation.title: I-魔术师
body: 当前房间中泪弹有追踪效果

source.title: II - The High Priestess
body: Summons Mom's foot which will stomp on a random enemy in the current room, dealing 300 damage
If no enemies are in the current room, the foot will target Isaac (and do damage if it hits), however it can be used to break rocks

translation.title: II-女祭司
body: 妈腿会践踏1个敌人
对敌人造成300点接触伤害
若没有敌人则会践踏角色

source.title: III - The Empress
body: Gives the player the Whore of Babylon effect for the current room, increasing damage and speed

translation.title: III-皇后
body: 当前房间中获得:

source.title: IV - The Emperor
body: Teleports the player to the Boss room on the current floor

translation.title: IV-皇帝
body: 将角色传送至头目房

source.title: V - The Hierophant
body: Spawns 2 Soul hearts on the floor

translation.title: V-教皇
body: 生成2魂心

source.title: VI - The Lovers
source.pickup: "May you prosper and be in good health"
body: Spawns 2 red hearts on the floor
If used in a Super Secret Room containing a Black Heart or Eternal Heart, it will spawn those types of hearts instead

translation.title: IV-恋人
body: 生成2红心

source.title: VII - The Chariot
body: Grants the same effect as 'My Little Unicorn', which makes Isaac invincible and deal 40 contact damage to enemies per hit

translation.title: VII-战车
body: 在6秒内获得:
无敌
角色无法发射泪弹, 但每秒造成40点接触伤害

source.title: VIII - Justice
body: Spawns 1 bomb, 1 key, 1 coin, 1 heart, which can be random variants of each

translation.title: VIII-正义
body: 生成1随机心, 1硬币, 1炸弹, 1钥匙

source.title: IX - The Hermit
source.pickup: "May you see what life has to offer"
body: Teleports the player to the Shop
On or below the Womb, this acts as a random teleport, since there are no shops on those floors

translation.title: IX-隐者
body: 将角色传送至商店

source.title: X - Wheel of Fortune
body: Spawns a Slot Machine or a Fortune Machine

translation.title: X-命运之轮
body: 生成1台赌博机
25%概率为预言机

source.title: XI - Strength
body: Gives the player the Magic Mushroom effect, which increasing size and all stats by 1 for the current room
If you use the Strength card with 12 heart containers, it will take you down to 11 when you leave the room

translation.title: XI-力量
body: 当前房间中获得:
↑ +1心之容器
↑ 伤害修正x1.5
↑ 泪弹高度+0.5

source.title: XII - The Hanged Man
body: Gives the player the flying effect for the current room, allowing the player to fly over obstacles in the room
This card is useless if you have any item which allows you to permanently fly

translation.title: XII-倒吊人
body: 当前房间中获得飞行

source.title: XIII - Death
source.pickup: "Lay waste to all that oppose you"
body: Deals 40 damage to all enemies in the room in a similar style to the Necronomicon

translation.title: XIII-死亡
body: 对房间中所有敌人造成40点伤害

source.title: XIV - Temperance
body: Spawns a Blood Donation Machine

translation.title: XIV-节制
body: 生成1台献血机

source.title: XV - The Devil
source.pickup: "Revel in the power of your darkness"
body: Gives the Book of Belial effect for the current room, increasing damage

translation.title: XV-恶魔
body: 当前房间中获得:
↑ 伤害+2

source.title: XVI - The Tower
body: Spawns some troll bombs at random locations in the current room
Each bomb deals 60 damage (normal bomb damage

translation.title: XVI-塔
body: 生成6个即爆炸弹

source.title: XVII - The Stars
body: Teleports the player to the Item Room
On or below the Womb, this acts as a random teleport, since there are no item rooms on those floors

translation.title: XVII-星星
body: 将角色传送至宝箱房

source.title: XVIII - The Moon
source.pickup: "May you find all you have lost"
body: Teleports the player to the Secret Room

translation.title: XVIII-月亮
body: 将角色传送至隐藏房

source.title: XIX - The Sun
source.pickup: "May the light heal and enlighten you"
body: A card with three uses: A full heal, deals 100 damage to all enemies in the current room and reveals the entire map for the current floor (Treasure Map + The Compass)

translation.title: XIX-太阳
body: 回满血
对所有敌人造成100点伤害
揭示本层全图并显示房间类型, 超级隐藏房除外

source.title: XX - Judgement
body: Spawns a beggar
Has a chance to be a demon beggar
Killing a Devil Beggar, Key Master, or Shell Game Beggar gives you an increased chance of finding Angel rooms instead of Devil rooms. See the dedicated Devil room page for more details

translation.title: XX-审判
body: 生成1个乞丐
33%概率为恶魔乞丐
2%概率为钥匙大师或炸弹乞丐

source.title: XXI - The World
body: Reveals the entire map and shows the icons for every room which has one
This is completely useless if you currently have both the Treasure Map and The Compass

translation.title: XXI-世界
body: 揭示本层全图并显示房间类型
无法揭示超级隐藏房的位置

source.title: 2 of Clubs
body: Doubles the number of Bombs you have
If you have no bombs, it gives you two

translation.title: 梅花2
body: 使角色持有的炸弹翻倍

source.title: 2 of Diamonds
body: Doubles the number of coins you have
If you have no coins, it gives you two

translation.title: 方片2
body: 使角色持有的硬币翻倍

source.title: 2 of Spades
body: Doubles the number of keys you have
If you have no keys, it gives you two

translation.title: 黑桃2
body: 使角色持有的钥匙翻倍

source.title: 2 of Hearts
body: Doubles your current red hearts up to full health
This card is useless for the Bluе Baby

translation.title: 红桃2
body: 使角色的红心翻倍(并非心之容器)

source.title: Ace of Clubs
body: When used, turns all pickups, chests and non-boss enemies in the room into Bombs
source.unlock: Unlock this item by getting a 3 win streak

translation.title: 梅花A
body: 将所有掉落物变成炸弹

source.title: Ace of Diamonds
body: When used, turns all pickups, chests and non-boss enemies in the room into Coins
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating The Lamb in under 20 minutes

translation.title: 方片A
body: 将所有掉落物变成硬币

source.title: Ace of Spades
body: When used, turns all pickups, chests and non-boss enemies in the room into Keys
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating The Lamb without taking hearts, coins and bombs

translation.title: 黑桃A
body: 将所有掉落物变成钥匙

source.title: Ace of Hearts
body: When used, turns all pickups, chests and non-boss enemies in the room into Hearts
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating any floor after Basement I with only half a heart of health (works as The Lost)

translation.title: 红桃A
body: 将所有掉落物变成随机心

source.title: The Joker
body: Teleports you to the Devil Deal Room on the current floor

translation.title: 鬼牌
body: 将角色传送至恶魔房/天使房

source.title: Suicide King
body: When used, instantly kills you and spawns 10 pickup on the floor
Each of the 10 things spawned can be any type of consumable or sometimes a pedestal item (up to a maximum of 3 pedestal items)
Any pedestal item created by Suicide King will be related to the room where it was used, meaning that using it in the Angel room will spawn Angel room items
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #7 (Suicide King)

translation.title: 自杀之王
body: 立即击杀角色并在地上生成10个掉落物或道具
生成的道具使用当前房间的道具池

source.title: Queen of Hearts
body: Drops 1-20 full red hearts on the floor
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Magdalene

translation.title: 红桃Q
body: 生成1-20红心

source.title: Chaos Card
body: A card which can be thrown as a projectile directly infront of Isaac, instantly killing anything it hits, including most bosses
If thrown at a multi-phase boss with multiple forms such Satan, Mega Satan or Hush it will only kill that particular phase of the boss
If thrown at a multi-phase boss that works from a single health bar such as Isaac, ??? or The Lamb, it will die instantly
Will not kill Delirium or The Beast
Will destroy rocks and poop in its path
Can also be thrown against a door to open it (Doesn't work against Mega Satan's door)
Throwing this at the Great Gideon boss will trigger a special animation and reveal a crawl space containing several chests and items!
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #9 (Demo Man)

translation.title: 混沌卡
body: 使用时, 向角色移动方向投出
立即击杀接触到的任何敌人(精神错乱除外)

source.title: Huge Growth
body: Temporarily makes Isaac huge, giving him +7 Damage Up and +30 Range Up for the rest of the current room
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Coper140
source.unlock: Unlock this item by getting 5 items or consumables that increase your size, e.g. 'One Makes you Larger' pills, Magic Mushroom etc

translation.title: 变巨术
body: 当前房间中获得:
↑ 伤害+7
体型变大
角色可粉碎接触的石头

source.title: Ancient Recall
body: Spawns 3 random cards on the floor when used
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Coper140

translation.title: 先祖召唤
body: 生成3随机卡牌

source.title: Era Walk
body: When used, this card will slow down enemies, Isaac's tears by -1 Shot Speed, but speed up Isaac's movement speed by +0.50 for the rest of the current room
Added as part of the Afterbirth+ Booster Pack #1 and based on the Steam Workshop mod created by Coper140
source.unlock: Unlock this item by getting both the Broken Watch and the Stop Watch in your collection

translation.title: 时空漫步
body: 当前房间中获得:
↓ 弹速-1
使敌人减速

source.title: Credit Card
body: When used, removes the price tag from all items in the current shop or devil deal, making everything free
The effect of the Credit Card only lasts for the current room
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #10 (Cursed!)

translation.title: 信用卡
body: 使商店/恶魔房的所有道具和掉落物免费

source.title: Rules Card
body: Displays a random cryptic message on the screen similar to the fortune machine ones. One of the following messages may show:
'Rooms may yield more than you expect'
'Some doors require a blessing. Carry them with you'
'The walls will harden over time. Time is the essence'
'Sleeping gatekeepers will need to be awoken with a loud sound'
'A piece of paper is your guide'
'Deny his gifts to attain your reward'
'A dark market lies under your feet
'Chub dislikes smoke!'
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #11 (Glass Cannon)

translation.title: 规则卡
body: 使用时, 显示"有帮助的"提示

source.title: Card Against Humanity
body: When used, fills the entire room with poop!
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #12 (When Life Gives You Lemons)

translation.title: 反人类卡
body: 整个房间中填满大便

source.title: Get Out Of Jail Free Card
body: When used, will open all doors in the current room, similar to a one-time use of Dad's Key
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #22 (Speed)
searchAliases: Get Out Of Jail Free Card

translation.title: 免费保释卡
body: 打开当前房间中所有的门
searchAliases: Get Out Of Jail Free Card

source.title: ? Card
body: When used this card will activate a use of your spacebar item for free

translation.title: ？卡
body: 免费激活1次角色的主动道具

source.title: Rune of Hagalaz
body: When used, this rune will destroy all breakable objects in the current room, such as poop, rocks, secret room entrances
This includes Key Blocks
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #1 (Pitch Black)

translation.title: 冰雹符文
body: 摧毁房间中所有石头

source.title: Rune of Jera
body: When used this rune will double all pickups on the floor in the room
Creates copies of pickups in the Shop which can be taken for free, even if you haven't purchased them yet
Can be used to double the number of item chests in the first room of the final Chest / Dark Room floors
Cloned chests have the same types of items as the first one
Cannot be used to clone trinkets or other Jera runes
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #2 (High Brow)

translation.title: 收获符文
body: 复制房间中所有掉落物

source.title: Rune of Ehwaz
body: Creates a trapdoor on the floor
Digging in certain spots with objects or markings on the floor will guarantee a crawlspace once per floor
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #3 (Head Trauma)

translation.title: 马骑符文
body: 生成1个前往下一层的活板门
8%概率为暗门

source.title: Rune of Dagaz
body: Removes the curse which is in effect on the current floor (except Curse of the Labyrinth)
Can also cure the effect of the Amnesia pill
+1 Soul Heart
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #4 (Darkness Falls)

translation.title: 朝夕符文
body: +1魂心
移除本层的所有诅咒

source.title: Rune of Ansuz
body: When used, reveals the entire map including all the secret room locations and other icon rooms
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #5 (The Tank)

translation.title: 诸神符文
body: 本层获得完整的地图效果

source.title: Rune of Perthro
body: Rerolls all pedestal items in the current room (One time use of the D6)
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #6 (Solar System)

translation.title: 签筒符文
body: 重置房间中所有底座道具

source.title: Rune of Berkano
body: Summons 3 blue friendly spiders and 3 blue flies
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #20 (Purist)

translation.title: 桦木符文
body: 召唤3只蓝蜘蛛和3只蓝苍蝇

source.title: Rune of Algiz
body: When used, gives you an invincibility effect which lasts for 20 seconds
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #8 (Cat Got Your Tongue)

translation.title: 保护符文
body: 角色无敌30秒

source.title: Blank Rune
body: When used, gives a random Mystic rune effect
Possible effects include: Algiz, Ansuz, Berkano, Dagaz, Ehwaz, Hagalaz, Jera, Perthro
Also has a 25% chance to spawn another Blank Rune upon use
source.unlock: Unlock this card by beating Challenge #30 (Guardian)

translation.title: 空白符文
body: 随机符文效果
使用后, 25%概率再掉落本身

source.title: Black Rune
body: When used, this rune deals 40 damage to all enemies in the room and consumes all pedestal items in the room, giving you a random stat increase for each item consumed
Also consumes all pickups in the room and turns them into blue flies and spiders
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating Greedier mode as Apollyon

translation.title: 黑符文
body: 对所有敌人造成40点伤害
将房间中所有底座道具变为随机属性提升
将所有掉落物变成蓝苍蝇

source.title: Rune Shard
body: Activates a random rune effect. The effect is weaker than normal runes.
These only appear if not all runes have been unlocked yet.

translation.title: 符文碎片
body: 随机符文效果
触发的符文效果较弱

source.title: Dice Shard
body: Gives a one-time use of the D6 and D20 effects at the same time

translation.title: 骰子碎片
body: 重置房间中所有底座道具和掉落物

source.title: Emergency Contact
body: When used will cause two of Mom's Hand to come down and grab a random enemy

translation.title: 紧急联系电话
body: 2个妈妈的手落下并抓住2个敌人

source.title: Holy Card
body: Grants the Holy Mantle effect for, which will negate your next hit of damage
The effect persist between rooms/floors
Tainted Lost starts with this card, and while playing as this character all cards and runes have a 10% chance to turn into a Holy Card
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Delirium in The Void floor with The Lost

translation.title: 神圣卡
body: 当前房间中获得神圣屏障护盾(阻挡1次伤害)
25%概率生成另1张神圣卡

source.title: Cracked Key
body: This is a one-time use of the Red Key item.

The main purpose of the Cracked Key is to unlock Tainted character in the Home floor without needing to find the Red Key. You can force spawn a cracked key by droping any trinket in a Boss Room or Item room, on any floor on your way down to Depths II. When you take the reverse path back up to Home, the trinket will turn into Cracked Key in the same floor/room you dropped it before.
source.unlock: Unlock this card by opening Mom's Box on the Home floor.

translation.title: 红钥匙碎片
body: 一次性的红钥匙

source.title: O - The Fool?
body: When used, this card drops all of your hearts (including non-red hearts), coins, keys and bombs on the floor
This effect is done in the most efficient way possible - e.g. if you have 99 coins it will create 3 x Quarters, 2 Dimes and 4 Pennies. If you have 40 bombs it will spawn 4 x Boom! pedestal items
Picking up all dropped items leaves you with the same health and consumables you had before
This allows you to manipulate your consumables in lots of different ways, for example by rerolling them with the D6/D20, re-arrange your Bone heart containers and more
If you have the Tarot Cloth item, this card will also drop all your passive items on the floor as pedestals
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Lost

translation.title: 0-愚者？
body: 将角色的所有心(留半心)和掉落物掉在地上
只保留半心
若数量充足, 可作为25美分和轰! 等道具生成

source.title: I - The Magician?
body: Gives you a blue aura that repels enemy projectiles, causing them to slowly curve away from Isaac and avoid hitting him
Lasts for 60 seconds
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Judas

translation.title: I-魔术师？
body: 获得排斥敌人和弹幕的光环, 持续60秒

source.title: II - The High Priestess?
body: Causes Mom's Foot to keep stomping down randomly for 60 seconds where Isaac is standing
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Lilith

translation.title: II-女祭司？
body: 妈腿持续尝试践踏角色, 持续60秒

source.title: III - The Empress?
body: Gives 2 HP Up and +1.5 Tears Up for 60 seconds
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Eve

translation.title: III-皇后？
body: 在60秒内获得:
↑ +2心之容器

source.title: IV - The Emperor?
body: Teleports you to an extra boss room, that drops a Boss room item as normal. This room isn't part of the actual floor, and leaving it returns you to where you teleported from
The boss isn't necessarily from the current floor - e.g. you could find a caves boss in the basement
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted ???

translation.title: IV-皇帝？
body: 传送至额外头目房, 清理后可获得道具
生成的头目来自下一章节

source.title: V - The Hierophant?
body: Spawns 2 Bone hearts on the floor
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Bethany

translation.title: V-教皇？
body: 生成2骨心

source.title: VI - The Lovers?
body: Spawns a random pedestal item from the current room's item pool
In exchange, turns one heart container or 2 soul hearts into a broken heart. Broken hearts permanently subtract from your total possible health containers
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Magdalene

translation.title: IV-恋人？
body: 生成当前房间道具池的1个道具
将1心之容器或2魂心转换为1碎心

source.title: VII - The Chariot?
body: Isaac turns to stone and can't move for 10 seconds, but your tear rate goes up significantly for the duration
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating challenge #42 (Hot Potato)

translation.title: VII-战车？
body: 在10秒内获得:
↑ 射速修正x4
无敌, 但不能移动

source.title: VIII - Justice?
source.pickup: "May your sins come back to torment you"
body: Spawns 2-4 locked gold chests
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating challenge #43 (Cantripped)

translation.title: VIII-正义？
body: 生成2-4个金箱子

source.title: IX - The Hermit?
source.pickup: "May you see the value of all things in life"
body: When used, all items and pickups in the current room are turned into money. Everything is sold for its shop price, e.g. Items for 15c, hearts for 3c, sacks for 7c
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating challenge #44 (Red Redemption)

translation.title: IX-隐者？
body: 将房间中掉落物和道具转换成其商店价值的硬币
若没有东西转换, 则改为生成1硬币

source.title: X - Wheel of Fortune?
body: Activates a random effect from a Dice room
See the dice icon above for each possible effect
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Cain

translation.title: X-命运之轮？
body: 触发1次随机骰子房效果

source.title: XI - Strength?
body: All enemies in the current room are slowed and take double damage
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Samson

translation.title: XI-力量？
body: 房间中的敌人被减速, 受到的伤害翻倍, 持续30秒

source.title: XII - The Hanged Man?
body: You turn into the Keeper, gaining triple shot, -0.1 Speed Down for 30 seconds
Enemies drop random coins while this effect is active
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Keeper

translation.title: XII-倒吊人？
body: 在30秒内获得:
三重泪弹
击杀的敌人掉落硬币

source.title: XIII - Death?
source.pickup: "May life spring forth from the fallen"
body: Activates the Book of the Dead effect, spawning a bone orbital or charmed Bony for each enemy killed in the current room
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Forgotten

translation.title: XIII-死亡？
body: 产生亡者之书的效果
即, 当前房间中每击杀1个敌人, 生成1个骨头实体

source.title: XIV - Temperance?
body: When used, this card activates 5 random pill effects one after the other
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating challenge #45 (DELETE THIS)

translation.title: XIV-节制？
body: 立即触发5次随机胶囊效果

source.title: XV - The Devil?
source.pickup: "Bask in the light of your mercy"
body: Activates The Bible effect (granting flight) and gives a Seraphim familiar for 30 seconds
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Azazel

translation.title: XV-恶魔？
body: 在30秒内获得:
撒拉弗跟班
圣经的效果:
飞行
立即击杀妈腿和妈心
当对撒但使用时, 角色会死亡

source.title: XVI - The Tower?
body: Spawns 6 clusters of rocks and objects that normally appear on this floor
It won't block any doors that exist
Rocks have a pretty good chance to become tinted rocks
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Apollyon

translation.title: XVI-塔？
body: 生成7堆随机石头和障碍物
其中经常会有标记石头

source.title: XVII - The Stars?
body: Removes your oldest item and spawns 2 pedestal items from the current room's pool
Can remove either passive or active items
Doesn't remove your character's starting items
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Isaac

translation.title: XVII-星星？
body: 移除角色最早收集的1个被动道具(初始道具除外)
生成当前房间道具池的2个道具

source.title: XVIII - The Moon?
body: Teleports you to the ultra secret room on the floor

The ultra secret room is a red room containing an item from the angel room item pool. Can only be accessed via the Red Key, Crystal Key or Cracked Key. Using this card will also open a pathway of red rooms back to the regular floor
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Jacob

translation.title: XVIII-月亮？
body: 将角色传送至究极隐藏房
返回的路由红色房间构成

source.title: XIX - The Sun?
source.pickup: "May the darkness swallow all around you"
body: When used, grants +1.5 Damage Up, turns your hearts to Bone hearts and the Spirit of the Night effect (Spectral tears and the ability to fly) for the current floor
Also gives the Curse of Darkness effect that can't be removed for the current floor
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Jacob

translation.title: XIX-太阳？
body: 在当前层获得:
飞行和灵体泪弹
心之容器变为骨心(可恢复)
黑暗诅咒

source.title: XX - Judgement?
body: Spawns a Restock machine
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Lazarus

translation.title: XX-审判？
body: 生成1个补货机

source.title: XXI - The World?
body: Creates a trapdoor to a guaranteed crawl space
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Ultra Greedier mode as Tainted Eden

translation.title: XXI-世界？
body: 生成1个暗门

source.title: Wild Card
body: When used, this copies the effect of the card, pill, rune, soul stone or active item you used most recently
source.unlock: Unlock this card by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Eden

translation.title: 万用牌
body: 复制最近使用过的胶囊/卡牌/符文/魂石/主动道具的效果

source.title: Soul of Isaac
body: Turns all pedestal items in the current room into rotating items, which cycle between the old item and a random new item every second
This allows you to effectively reroll items like with The D6, but choose the old item as well if you want
Tainted Isaac has this effect passively for all items
If you use more than one in the same room, each pedestal item will cycle through +1 random item
Items are chosen from the item pool related to the current item
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Isaac

translation.title: 以撒的魂石
body: 使房间中所有底座道具在2个道具之间切换

source.title: Soul of Magdalene
body: When used, all enemies in the current room drop half a red heart that will disappear after 2 seconds if not picked up
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Magdalene

translation.title: 抹大拉的魂石
body: 在当前房间中:
被击杀的敌人掉落2秒后消失的半红心

source.title: Soul of Cain
body: When used, this Soul Stone creates Red rooms for every possible exit in the current room
Red outlines of doors appear where this Soul Stone will create exits for
See the Red Key item description for more information about these Red rooms behave
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Cain

translation.title: 该隐的魂石
body: 打开房间中所有的门
尽可能在每面墙上创造红色房间

source.title: Soul of Judas
body: Activates the Dark Arts item effect, which turns Isaac into a ghost for a few seconds. While in this form you can walk over enemies to mark them for death. After a few seconds, he will quickly attack each target, chaining higher damage for each enemy it hits
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Judas

translation.title: 犹大的魂石
body: 激活暗仪刺刀3秒
每击中1个敌人/弹幕, 都有↑ 暂时伤害提升

source.title: Soul of ???
body: When used this will cause 8 poison farts that leave a brown creep behind, and then drop 7 Butt Bombs very quickly
Standing in the creep gives you +1 Damage Up and +1.35 Tears Up
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Blue Baby

translation.title: ???的魂石
body: 产生8团毒气并留下棕色水迹, 然后快速生成7屁股炸弹
站在水迹中获得:
↑ 伤害+1

source.title: Soul of Eve
body: For the current room, 14 Dead Birds fly in from off the screen and attack all enemies, dealing low but frequent damage
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Eve

translation.title: 夏娃的魂石
body: 在当前房间中生成14只死鸟跟班追击敌人

source.title: Soul of Samson
body: Isaac gains the Berserk! effect for 10 seconds. This gives Isaac a bone sword and he goes on a killing rampage, gaining +0.4 Speed, +3 Flat Damage Up
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Samson

translation.title: 参孙的魂石
body: 激活狂怒! 10秒
每次击杀使效果延长1秒

source.title: Soul of Azazel
body: Activates the Mega Blast item effect, which gives you a giant laser that deals x5 your tear damage per tick to anything in its path and pushing Isaac back by the force
The effect lasts for 8 seconds but does persist between rooms
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Azazel

translation.title: 阿撒泻勒的魂石
body: 发射超级喷射7.5秒

source.title: Soul of Lazarus
body: When used this kills Isaac and revives him with 1/2 a red heart. You get a couple of seconds of invincibility to move away after
The main benefit of this Soul Stone is that it automatically activates if you die, meaning it is effectively an extra passive life while held
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Lazarus

translation.title: 拉撒路的魂石
body: 角色死亡并立即以半心复活
致死时自动使用此物品(相当于多一条命)

source.title: Soul of Eden
body: Activates the D6 and D20 effects, rerolling all items and pickups in the room. Unlike the regular D6, rerolled items can pick from any item pool
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Eden

translation.title: 伊甸的魂石
body: 重置当前房间中的底座道具和掉落物
重置的道具来自随机道具池

source.title: Soul of the Lost
body: When used, Isaac dies and becomes The Lost for the current room. This gives you his ability to fly, and the Holy Mantle effect. However if you take damage a second time you die like the Lost does
Same effect as touching a white fire, but only lasts one room
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Lost

translation.title: 游魂的魂石
body: 在当前房间中, 角色变为游魂
允许免费在恶魔房拿1个道具
可以免费直接进入陵墓或炼狱

source.title: Soul of Lilith
body: Gives you 1 random permanent familiar
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Lilith

translation.title: 莉莉丝的魂石
body: 永久获得1个随机跟班

source.title: Soul of the Keeper
body: Spawns up to 25 random coins on the floor
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Keeper

translation.title: 店主的魂石
body: 生成1-25随机硬币

source.title: Soul of Apollyon
body: Creates 15 random Locusts
Locusts are variants of blue flies, except they have special effects based on the color
War (Red) - Explodes when touching the enemy. The actual explosion deals flat 60 damage
Pestilence (Green) - Poisons the enemy it attacks
Famine (Brown) - Applies a slowing effect
Death (Black) - Deals x4 damage instead of x2
Conquest (White) - Spawns 2-5 at once
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Apollyon

translation.title: 亚玻伦的魂石
body: 生成15只随机蝗虫

source.title: Soul of the Forgotten
body: Gives you The Forgotten as a temporary familiar, with 2 Bone hearts and his bone weapon. He behaves the same as how Esau works with Jacob, following your exact movements
Disappears after the current room or if he takes enough damage and dies
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Forgotten

translation.title: 遗骸的魂石
body: 在当前房间中生成遗骸作为副角色

source.title: Soul of Bethany
body: Creates 6 wisps, similar to the Book of Virtues effect
Mosts wisps will be the standard blue ones, but have a chance to have random special properties
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Bethany

translation.title: 伯大尼的魂石
body: 生成6个随机的美德之书魂火

source.title: Soul of Jacob and Esau
body: Spawns Esau as a temporary familiar, who copies your exact movements the same as how the Jacob & Esau character works
Disappears after the current room or if he takes enough damage and dies
source.unlock: Unlock this item by defeating Hush and Boss Rush as Tainted Jacob

translation.title: 雅各与以扫的魂石
body: 在当前房间中生成以扫作为副角色
以扫含有与角色等量的被动道具

source.title: Gold Key
body: Once picked up, you gain unlimited key use for the rest of the floor
Using a 'Bombs are Key' pill with this effect will swap your Gold Key for a Gold Bomb

translation.title: 金钥匙
body: 拾取后，本层内钥匙可无限使用。
若在该效果生效时使用“炸弹变钥匙”胶囊，你的金钥匙会变为金炸弹。

source.title: Gold Bomb
body: Once picked up, you gain unlimited bomb use for the rest of the floor
Using a 'Bombs are Key' pill with this effect will swap your Gold Bomb for a Gold Key
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating challenge #23 (Blue Bomber)

translation.title: 金炸弹
body: 拾取后，本层内炸弹可无限使用。
若在该效果生效时使用“炸弹变钥匙”胶囊，你的金炸弹会变为金钥匙。

source.title: Golden Battery
body: Fully charges your active item when picked up
Also, you take a full heart of damage when picked up. Doing this will cause this Golden Battery to reappear somewhere else on the floor
source.unlock: Unlock this by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Forgotten

translation.title: 金电池
body: 拾取时会为你的主动道具完全充能。
同时你会在拾取时受到整整一颗心的伤害；触发后，这枚金电池会在本层其他位置重新出现。

source.title: Golden Troll Bomb
body: Spawns similar to regular troll bombs and cannot be picked up
However, they will explode forever instead of disappearing
The Safety Scissors trinket will turn this into a gold bomb

translation.title: 金色即爆炸弹
body: 其生成方式类似普通即爆炸弹，且无法拾取。
但它会无限次连续爆炸，而不是爆炸后消失。
若持有安全剪刀饰品，它会变成金炸弹。

source.title: Golden Penny
body: When picked up, will respawn again at a random location in the room
Every time you pick up a golden penny it has a 5% chance to disappear completely
source.unlock: Unlock this by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Keeper

translation.title: 金便士
body: 每次拾取后，都会在房间内随机位置再次出现。
每次拾取金便士时，都有 5% 概率彻底消失。

source.title: Gold Heart
body: Once picked up, the gold heart will drop money on the floor the next time Isaac loses a heart
source.unlock: Unlock this item by beating challenge #21 (XXXXXXXXL)

translation.title: 金心
body: 拾取后，下次以撒失去一颗心时，金心会在地上掉出金币。

source.title: Bone Heart
body: Takes three hits to deplete and can be refilled with red hearts, but disappears forever when depleted
source.unlock: Unlock this item by unlocking the Forgotten character. See the Broken Shovel / Mom's Shovel items for more information on how to unlock

translation.title: 骨心
body: 可承受 3 次伤害，并能用红心重新填充；但一旦耗尽，就会永久消失。

source.title: Rotten Heart
body: Rotten Hearts fill up a whole container the same as normal red hearts, or the rightmost heart if you're at full health
Every time you clear a room, you'll spawn 2 Blue Flies for each Rotten Heart you currently have
source.unlock: Unlock this by entering the Corpse floor for the first time

translation.title: 腐心
body: 腐心会像普通红心一样占据整格心之容器；若你已满血，则会占据最右侧的心位。
每当你清理一个房间，当前持有的每颗腐心都会生成 2 只蓝苍蝇。

source.title: Black Sack
body: Spawns 2-3 pills, black/bone hearts and/or bombs when picked up
Can spawn in place of a regular sack, including in Shops for 7c
Only one heart can spawn per sack as a maximum
source.unlock: Unlock this by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Judas

translation.title: 黑福袋
body: 拾取时会掉出 2 至 3 个胶囊、黑心/骨心和/或炸弹。
它可以替代普通福袋生成，也包括商店里售价 7 金币的那种。
每个福袋最多只会生成 1 颗心类掉落。

source.title: Rebirth Pills A - L
body: 48 Hour Energy - Fully recharges your active item and drops 1-2 battery pickups. Can be used with Placebo to generate infinite batteries
Amnesia - Hides the floor map for the rest of the current floor (same as curse of the lost). Can be negated with Black Candle
Bad Gas - Isaac farts, poisoning enemies around him
Bad Trip - Deals damage to yourself
Balls of Steel - +2 Soul Hearts
Bombs are key - Switches number of bombs and keys
Explosive Diarrhea - Spawns five live troll bombs behind Isaac, one per second
Full Health - Restores all your empty red heart containers
Health Down - -1 HP. If you have 1 or less heart containers, this pill becomes Health Up
Health Up - +1 HP
Hematemesis - Empties all but one red heart container and spawns 1-4 red hearts on the floor. Spawns coins as The Keeper
I can see forever - Opens secret room and super secret room entrances on the current floor
I found pills - Changes the appearance of Isaac's face for the current room (Cosmetic change only)
Lemon Party - Spawns a large yellow pool on the floor around you, damaging enemies which walk in it
Luck Down - Reduces your luck stat by -1
Luck Up - Increases your luck stat by +1

translation.title: 重生胶囊 A - L
body: 48 Hour Energy - 为主动道具完全充能，并掉落 1 至 2 个电池；可配合安慰剂无限刷电池。
Amnesia - 本层剩余时间内隐藏地图，效果类似迷失诅咒；黑蜡烛可抵消。
Bad Gas - 以撒放屁，使周围敌人中毒。
Bad Trip - 对自己造成伤害。
Balls of Steel - +2 魂心。
Bombs are key - 交换炸弹与钥匙数量。
Explosive Diarrhea - 每秒在以撒身后生成 1 个即爆炸弹，共 5 个。
Full Health - 回满所有空的红心容器。
Health Down - 生命 -1；若心之容器不多于 1 个，则改为 Health Up。
Health Up - 生命 +1。
Hematemesis - 清空除 1 颗外的所有红心，并在地上生成 1 至 4 颗红心；店主则生成硬币。
I can see forever - 打开当前层隐藏房与超级隐藏房入口。
I found pills - 本房间内改变以撒的脸，仅外观变化。
Lemon Party - 在脚下生成一大片黄色液体，对踩上的敌人造成伤害。
Luck Down - 幸运 -1。
Luck Up - 幸运 +1。

source.title: Rebirth Pills P - Z
body: Paralysis - Prevents you from moving for a short while
Pheromones - Applies the charm effect to all enemies in the room for a short while
Puberty - Causes Isaac to grow hair for the rest of the run. Cosmetic change only. In Afterbirth+, taking 3 of this pill gives the Adult transformation
Pretty Fly - Gives Isaac +1 fly orbital, which blocks enemy projectiles and damages fly-type enemies on touch
Range Down - Reduces your range stat by -2
Range Up - Increases your range stat by +2.5
R U a wizard? - Tears will shoot diagonally for about 60 seconds. Effect persists between rooms while the time period is active
Speed Down - Reduces your speed stat by -0.12
Speed Up - Increases your speed stat by +0.15
Tears Down - Reduces your tears stat by -0.28
Tears Up - Increases your tears stat by 0.35
Telepills - Teleports you to a random room when used. Has a small chance to take you to the I AM ERROR room, and a smaller chance to teleport to a Black Market

translation.title: 重生胶囊 P - Z
body: Paralysis - 短时间内无法移动。
Pheromones - 短时间内对房间内所有敌人施加魅惑效果。
Puberty - 本局剩余时间内让以撒长出体毛，仅外观变化；在 Afterbirth+ 中吃 3 次可获得成人套装。
Pretty Fly - 获得 1 个苍蝇环绕物，可挡子弹并接触伤害苍蝇类敌人。
Range Down - 射程 -2。
Range Up - 射程 +2.5。
R U a wizard? - 约 60 秒内改为对角线射击，跨房间持续到时间结束。
Speed Down - 移速 -0.12。
Speed Up - 移速 +0.15。
Tears Down - 射速 -0.28。
Tears Up - 射速 +0.35。
Telepills - 使用后传送到随机房间；有小概率去 I AM ERROR 房，更小概率传送到黑市。

source.title: Afterbirth Pills
body: Addicted - Causes you to take a full heart of damage for all sources for the current room. Unlocked from Challenge #24 - PAY TO PLAY
Friends till the end - Spawns three friendly blue attack flies
Infested! - Destroys all poops in the room and spawns a blue attack spider on every destroyed poop
Infested? - Spawns one blue attack spider for every enemy in the room. If there are no enemies this pill spawns 1-3 blue spiders instead
One makes you smaller - Reduces Isaac's size and hitbox size
One makes you larger - Increases Isaac's size, but does not affect the size of his hitbox
Percs - Causes Isaac to only take half a heart of damage from all sources for the current room (The Wafer effect). Unlocked from Challenge #24 - PAY TO PLAY
Power Pill - Gives you invulnerability and the ability to damage enemies for a short while (similar to The Gamekid effect)
Re-Lax - Causes Isaac to spawn poops behind him while he walks for a few seconds. Similar to Explosive Diarrhea but with poop
Retro Vision - Pixelates the screen for a few seconds, obscuring your vision. Happens a total of 3 times over 30 seconds
??? - Gives the curse of the maze effect for the current floor. Unlocked from Challenge #25 - Have a Heart

translation.title: 胎衣胶囊
body: Addicted - 当前房间内所有来源都会对你造成整颗心伤害；由挑战 24“PAY TO PLAY”解锁。
Friends till the end - 生成 3 只友方蓝苍蝇。
Infested! - 摧毁房内所有大便，并为每个被摧毁的大便生成 1 只蓝蜘蛛。
Infested? - 房间内每有 1 个敌人就生成 1 只蓝蜘蛛；若无敌人则生成 1 至 3 只。
One makes you smaller - 缩小以撒体型和判定箱。
One makes you larger - 增大以撒体型，但不影响受击判定箱大小。
Percs - 当前房间内所有伤害减为半颗心，类似圣饼效果；由挑战 24“PAY TO PLAY”解锁。
Power Pill - 短时间无敌并可接触伤害敌人，类似掌机效果。
Re-Lax - 数秒内移动时在身后留下大便，类似爆炸性腹泻但换成大便。
Retro Vision - 数秒内像素化画面，总共会在 30 秒内出现 3 次。
??? - 当前楼层获得迷宫诅咒效果；由挑战 25“Have a Heart”解锁。

source.title: Afterbirth+ Pills
body: Feels like I'm walking on sunshine! - Turns Isaac invincible for a few seconds (similar to Unicorn Stump). Unlocked from the 'Sin Collector' achievement (collect every Bestiary entry)

Gulp! - When used will consume your current trinket, destroying it and giving you its effect permanently. Unlocked from the 'Once more with the feeling!' achievement (complete a victory lap, defeating the lamb boss)
Horf! - When used, shoots an Ipecac explosive shot. Unlocked from the 'Dedication' achievement (participate in 31 dailies in a row)
I'm Drowsy... - Slows all enemies for the rest of the current room
I'm excited!!! - Speeds up all enemies for the rest of the room. The effect triggers again 30 seconds after use and again 60 seconds after use
Something's wrong... - Spawns a pool of black creep beneath Isaac
Vurp! - Spawns the last pill you used. Spawns another Vurp! pill if no other pills were used yet. Unlocked from the 'U broke it!' achievement (collect 50 items in a single run)
X-Lax - Spawns a pool of slippery brown creep beneath Isaac

translation.title: 胎衣+胶囊
body: Feels like I'm walking on sunshine! - 数秒内无敌，类似独角兽残肢；由“Sin Collector”成就解锁。
Gulp! - 吞下当前饰品，销毁饰品并永久获得其效果；由“Once more with the feeling!”成就解锁。
Horf! - 发射一枚吐根爆炸弹；由“Dedication”成就解锁。
I'm Drowsy... - 当前房间内使所有敌人减速。
I'm excited!!! - 当前房间内使所有敌人加速；效果会在 30 秒和 60 秒后再次触发。
Something's wrong... - 在以撒脚下生成一滩黑色液体。
Vurp! - 生成你上一次使用的胶囊；若此前没用过胶囊，则生成另一个 Vurp!；由“U broke it!”成就解锁。
X-Lax - 在以撒脚下生成一滩会打滑的棕色液体。

source.title: Repentance Pills
body: Shot Speed Down - -0.15 shot speed
Shot Speed Up - +0.15 shot speed
Experimental Pill - Increases one random stat and decreases another random stat. Amount changed equals the equivalent stat up/down pill. If you have PhD it will only increase one stat

translation.title: 忏悔胶囊
body: Shot Speed Down - 弹速 -0.15。
Shot Speed Up - 弹速 +0.15。
Experimental Pill - 随机提升一项属性并降低另一项属性，变动量等同于对应属性升降胶囊；若持有药学博士证，则只会提升一项属性。

source.title: Gold Pill
body: When used gives a random pill effect
Can be used multiple times, but every time you use it, it has a chance to disappear
The Gold Pill can spawn as a Horse Pill, which then causes it to give random Horse pill effects
source.unlock: Unlock this by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Cain

translation.title: 金胶囊
body: 使用时会触发一种随机胶囊效果。
可多次使用，但每次使用后都有概率消失。
金胶囊也可能以马胶囊形式生成，此时会触发随机的马胶囊效果。

source.title: Horse Pills
body: Horse Pills rarely spawn as larger versions of normal pills with more powerful effects
Items that synergize with pills also have the same effect with Horse pills

In general, the effect of a Horse Pill is double the effect of a normal pill i.e. Speed Up will be +0.3 instead of +0.15. Pills with effects that can't necessarily 'double' are stronger, i.e. Pretty Fly gives a Big Fan item rather than a fly orbital
source.unlock: Unlock this by defeating Mega Satan as Tainted Eve

translation.title: 马胶囊
body: 马胶囊会以更大号的普通胶囊稀有生成，且效果更强。
所有与胶囊联动的道具，对马胶囊同样生效。
通常来说，马胶囊的效果是普通胶囊的两倍，例如移速上升会变为 +0.3 而非 +0.15；某些无法简单翻倍的效果则会以更强形式表现，例如 Pretty Fly 会改为获得大型环绕物。

source.title: Dice Rooms
body: 1 Dot - Rerolls all of your items. (Does not change your trinkets, pills or cards)
2 Dot - Rerolls all pickups in the room. (D20 effect)
3 Dot - Rerolls all pickups on the entire floor
4 Dot - Rerolls all pedestal items on the floor. (Does not roll your devil deal items)
5 Dot - Reroll and restart the current floor (Forget Me Now effect)
6 Dot - Reroll all of your items and all the pickups on the entire floor (Combined 1 + 3 + 4 rooms)

translation.title: 骰子房
body: 1点 - 重掷你身上的所有道具，不会改变饰品、胶囊或卡牌。
2点 - 重掷当前房间内所有掉落物，效果类似 D20。
3点 - 重掷本层所有掉落物。
4点 - 重掷本层所有底座道具，不会重掷恶魔交易道具。
5点 - 重置并重新开始当前楼层，效果类似 Forget Me Now。
6点 - 重掷你身上的所有道具，并重掷本层全部掉落物，等同于 1 点 + 3 点 + 4 点的组合。
